name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20IN=20GOP?=
subject: HOURS REMAINING! Push us to victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
There’s less than 48 hours until the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Will you step up? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469778?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4928e3f776&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

My finance team just sent me a report this morning on our end-of-quarter fundraising numbers. And I’ll be honest – to meet our targets between now and Election Day, we’re going to need your help now.

We only have until 11:59 p.m. tonight until this quarter’s fundraising numbers are final. This is the funding that’s critical to getting our Indiana Republican ticket first across the finish line.

[Will you rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution to help us close the gap?](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=046986dea2&e=1acd9bb3d6)

We can’t afford to fall short, Hoosier Republican. Indiana needs to carry the flag for Republicans across the country. Fellow Hoosier Amy Coney Barrett is poised to become the next Supreme Court justice, and our candidates here are fully supporting her!

But if we lose here, we’ll lose America to the extreme-left Democrats. They’ve already threatened to impeach the President again, abolish the Electoral College or pack the Supreme Court if they return to power!

Will you chip in to help our Indiana Republican ticket win big and keep Indiana RED?
---
| [DONATE NOW >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b16e79fc57&e=1acd9bb3d6 "DONATE NOW >>")
---
| **Please respond today. We have less than 24 hours to go until this all-important end-of-quarter deadline, and we need EVERY supporter on board**.

**Every dollar counts, and I’m sure that if all of our supporters contributed $5 right now, we will be in a position for victory on November 3rd**.

Thanks for your support,
Kyle Hupfer
---
| [DONATE NOW >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=77fe91ecfa&e=1acd9bb3d6 "DONATE NOW >>")

name: David Wysong, Powered by People
subject: With your help, we can flip Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

It’s been
awhile since you last heard from me. I’m David Wysong, Beto’s former Chief
of Staff and Campaign Manager. Now, I help Beto run Powered by People.
I’ve been around all of Texas (more than once) and talked to more voters
than I can count. So when I say that I truly, truly believe we can take
back the State House and pick up more congressional seats, you know I mean
it.

At least twice a week, every week, for months, I have watched hundreds of
volunteers log on for our phone banks. Just last weekend, we surpassed
90,000 new voters registered across Texas — and this Saturday, we’re
planning on registering our 100,000th voter. Plus, we have passed five
million voter contact calls!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43662?refcode=ema20200930-107192&t=1001&akid=107192%2E444211%2EecUuGy ]Can you make a gift — whatever you can afford right now — to help
support our people-powered movement? Donations go towards running our
many, many phone banks and our efforts to contact every Texas voter before
November.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43672?refcode=ema20200930-107192&t=1020&akid=107192%2E444211%2EecUuGy ]Contribute $10

Between the hundreds of volunteers making calls every single week to the
local State House candidates stepping up and running in tough districts, I
really believe that this year, we can do it. We can flip Texas blue. We
just need your help to push us over the November finish line. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43662?refcode=ema20200930-107192&t=1021&akid=107192%2E444211%2EecUuGy ]Please
consider donating to Powered by People before midnight tonight to help us
reach more voters than ever in the next five weeks.

If that doesn’t motivate you to donate or volunteer, just watch last
night’s debate!

Thanks for all your support.

David Wysong

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43673?refcode=ema20200930-107192&t=1022&akid=107192%2E444211%2EecUuGy ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=107192%2E444211%2EecUuGy

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Steve Chabot
subject: So What the Heck is a Discharge Petition (and Why Should I Care?)
body:
Pelosi Pulls the Rug from Under Small Businesses No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [So What the Heck is a Discharge Petition (and Why Should I Care?)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-j/)
There's no question that American small businesses were drastically affected by the COVID crisis. One important lifeline for small businesses, the PPP (Paycheck Protection Program), expired in early August with $138 billion still available in its coffers. For the past few weeks, I've been trying to get a bill passed to reopen PPP to help ailing businesses. Unfortunately Nancy Pelosi won't allow the bill to come up for a vote. In this weeks blog, I discuss how a discharge petition might be our only hope. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A Stark Choice: Support the Police, or Undermine Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-d/)
As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. In this week's blog, I discuss why now, more than ever, we need to support our police and first responders. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Actual Progress Towards Peace](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-u/)
In a blog post a few weeks back, I wrote about the US brokered deal between Israel and the UAE. Well last Friday, it was announced that Bahrain would also normalize relations with Israel. That was followed up yesterday by an historic signing ceremony at the White House. In this week's blog I discuss why these peace deals are very big. Another promise kept by President Trump! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Does More Mail-in Voting Mean More Fraud?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-n/)
Recently there has been a lot of debate about mail-in balloting for the upcoming election. President Trump has been quite vocal in his opposition to mass mail-in voting and the mainstream press has dutifully negated Trump's concerns, regularly framing his views as unfounded and originating from the fringe. In this week's blog, I explain why Trump may have every reason to be cautious about mail-in voting and the increased potential for fraud. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jumtyjd-kujkulhluu-f/)

clean_body: Pelosi Pulls the Rug from Under Small Businesses No images? There's no question that American small businesses were drastically affected by the COVID crisis. One important lifeline for small businesses, the PPP (Paycheck Protection Program), expired in early August with $138 billion still available in its coffers. For the past few weeks, I've been trying to get a bill passed to reopen PPP to help ailing businesses. Unfortunately Nancy Pelosi won't allow the bill to come up for a vote. In this weeks blog, I discuss how a discharge petition might be our only hope. Previous Blog Posts As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Before bed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
It's almost midnight in Georgia |
---
Friend -- It's almost midnight in Georgia.

Closing out this fundraising quarter, I'm amazed how far we've come.

**This is truly the most competitive Senate race in America.**

In the last 10 days, we've seen eight polls showing me and David Perdue within three points of each other -- with **_two polls *just yesterday* showing me IN THE LEAD!_**

Friend, any way you cut it, whichever poll you're looking at -- **this race is NECK AND NECK.**

It's going to take strong fundraising to win, **_and the deadline is tonight._**

**[We're still short of our critical $200,000 end-of-quarter goal.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e92/5b2c1286/3bf7fe8e/25f27f15/4064710783/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_bed?refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_bed")**

**[Friend, can you rush a donation BEFORE MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to break this tie and send me to the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e92/5b2c1286/3bf7fe8e/25f27f15/4064710783/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_bed?refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_bed")**
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__
| | **[$10->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e92/5b2c1286/3bf7fe8e/25f27f14/4064710783/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_bed?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_bed_ex_10")**

| **[$75->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e92/5b2c1286/3bf7fe8e/25f27f19/4064710783/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_bed?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_bed_ex_75")**

| **[$100->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e92/5b2c1286/3bf7fe8e/25f27f18/4064710783/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_bed?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_bed_ex_100")**
---
| **[Other->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e92/5b2c1286/3bf7fe8e/25f27f1b/4064710783/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_bed?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_bed_ex_other")**
---

Of course, this race isn't about polls, friend.

It's about human rights. It's about democracy. It's about the integrity of our leaders. And it's about our health.

For years, my opponent, Senator David Perdue, has worked desperately to repeal the Affordable Care Act.

Even though the ACA helps millions access health care, the GOP hates it just because they hate President Obama.

_Even in the midst of this pandemic, my opponent continues to support a lawsuit that could gut protections that ensure access to health care for Georgians with cancer, heart disease, diabetes, and other pre-existing conditions._

**Friend, Senator Perdue --_who is heavily funded by the insurance industry_ \-- is rushing the judicial confirmation process so the Supreme Court will pursue a partisan agenda undermining Americans' health care, rather than impartially upholding the rule of law and public interest.**

Mitch McConnell and his allies are spending close to **_$40 MILLION_** to defeat me and save Senator Perdue.

**But what McConnell doesn't realize is that I have grassroots supporters like you who are powering this campaign.**

**[Your energy is unstoppable, your support motivates me every day.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e92/5b2c1286/3bf7fe8e/25f27f15/4064710783/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_30_j_bed?refcode=em_2020_09_30_j_bed")**

**[You're going to crush this $200,000 fundraising goal before tonight's FEC deadline. clean_body: It's almost midnight in Georgia | Friend -- It's almost midnight in Georgia. Closing out this fundraising quarter, I'm amazed how far we've come. This is truly the most competitive Senate race in America. In the last 10 days, we've seen eight polls showing me and David Perdue within three points of each other -- with two polls just yesterday showing me IN THE LEAD! Friend, any way you cut it, whichever poll you're looking at -- this race is NECK AND NECK. It's going to take strong fundraising to win, and the deadline is tonight. "" "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Of course, this race isn't about polls, friend. It's about human rights. It's about democracy. It's about the integrity of our leaders. And it's about our health. For years, my opponent, Senator David Perdue, has worked desperately to repeal the Affordable Care Act. Even though the ACA helps millions access health care, the GOP hates it just because they hate President Obama. Even in the midst of this pandemic, my opponent continues to support a lawsuit that could gut protections that ensure access to health care for Georgians with cancer, heart disease, diabetes, and other pre-existing conditions. Friend, Senator Perdue --who is heavily funded by the insurance industry \-- is rushing the judicial confirmation process so the Supreme Court will pursue a partisan agenda undermining Americans' health care, rather than impartially upholding the rule of law and public interest. Mitch McConnell and his allies are spending close to $40 MILLION to defeat me and save Senator Perdue. But what McConnell doesn't realize is that I have grassroots supporters like you who are powering this campaign. "" "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" With love, Jon Sent from my iPhone | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

body:
As the election draws near, the stakes are too high for you to not get involved! We need your help! | | | | [ ](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=f2d7940201&e=a39a40cba9)

| | | **VIRTUAL SUPER SATURDAY!** Peter, This Saturday on October 3rd, we're trying something new. You see, we have a bit of a problem - last week we had TOO MANY volunteers and weren't able to fit them all in one place when we took a break. We also have more and more people signing up. So we're trying a [**Virtual Super Saturday**](https://webber2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe3c82000daee7a8e38e3b9c9&id=a5e95be899&e=a39a40cba9)!! Here's how it works: **10:00 am to 11:00 am** at the latest - online training on "phonebanking", which is how we mobilize our voters!! You don't have to dial any numbers or leave voicemails. **11:00 am to 5:00 pm** \- make as many calls as you can from home, or distribute as much literature as you can in your own neighborhood. The top caller and canvasser on Saturday will each receive a signed Errol Webber Campaign Banner! The two top performers for the month of October will get a FREE ticket to my Election Night Yacht party. Be sure to sign up below so we can send you your online training information and enter you into the competition!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: Presidential Debate Recap and Next Steps...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Dear Friends-** **Presidential debates are about having a discussion around competing visions and plans for the country explained, deconstructed and evaluated. What we witnessed last night was the President of the United States devolving the format into a barrage of [lies](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5e185348dd&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [interruptions](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9adb028e1c&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and a round-up posse [directive](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f068e770ca&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to the Proud Boys that they were so delighted to receive, they’ve updated their [logo](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=417498bba5&e=d6c5c7d7ec). ** **After sifting through a lot of the feedback and social and the headlines today, there are some takeaways that we need your help in doing. A lot of people went to bed upset but fired up to see Trump go. Don’t miss that last part in seeing this as an organizing moment. ** **Because there was only one leader on the stage of last night’s Presidential debate, and that leader was Vice President Joe Biden. That leader stood up for our lives under the mismanagement of this pandemic and the economy, called out racism and fought to focus on the welfare of our families even as attacks were unleashed against his own family. ** **Trump had no plan, and Vice President Biden [confronted](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2a265205a5&e=d6c5c7d7ec) him about that fact. He told a host of lies during the debate on [health care](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e86cc9ac6a&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [climate change](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=32fd1a57ed&e=d6c5c7d7ec), [voting](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0bb8718ed7&e=d6c5c7d7ec), and [jobs](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0c96cc664d&e=d6c5c7d7ec) but there was one moment when he finally admitted his plans to cut health care. He said outright “[we’re cutting health care](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1e55e80c7f&e=d6c5c7d7ec).” We’ve known all along that health care was on the ballot and he has just confirmed it. ** **The time is now for us to ensure that the folks with knots in their stomachs remember that people have already been voting in record numbers and they are cutting our way disproportionately. The goal right now is to keep turning people out, helping them to get good information on how to vote ([iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=408ae96893&e=d6c5c7d7ec)), and to keep scaling up our voter protection efforts. ** **Last night’s debate gave us additional fuel and urgency. We need to get our communities to vote and vote early. Trump has given the orders to a known hate group to “[stand back and stand by](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f20c63a2d5&e=d6c5c7d7ec)”. They have their orders. But as Princess Philomena Desmond, who is one of the Co-Chairs of the African Diaspora for Biden, said to me today, “Our Joe struck back and he spoke directly to the people which Trump never did. But we have to be prepared for the days ahead”. Mama Philomena, I agree. So folks please read down for some of our asks.** **We will send out information again next Wednesday, October 7th for the Vice Presidential debate. ** **In Solidarity,** **Mũthoni **
---
|
---
| **In this update you will find messaging guidance from the Biden campaign along with volunteer information about volunteer opportunities that you can share with your networks on the topics mentioned below. We need volunteers to answer our voter protection hotline, serve as voter protection attorneys, and commit to phone banking. ** **Topics**
* **Voter Protection Hotline and Volunteer Opportunities**
* **Talkers Toplines:**
* **Supreme Court**
* **Health Care**
* **COVID 19**
* **Scranton vs Park Avenue **
* **President Trump’s Taxes**
* **Donald Trump and Race**
* **Law and Order with Justice**
* **Climate Change**
* **Voting**

---
|
---
| **VOTER PROTECTION HOTLINE AND VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES** **[Help on the National Voter Assistance Hotline!](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e014b4b363&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **Who: 2020 Victory Voter Protection ** **When: Now! We have shifts every day!** **What is the work: Help us elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by staffing the national voter protection hotline, answer questions from voters around the country and help people exercise their right to vote! ** **Why is it urgent: Voting has started in many states and more people than ever are calling our hotline with questions about how to request their ballot in the mail or navigate in person voting this fall. This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot!** **Length of Commitment: A shift is typically 3 hours. ** **Sign Up Here: [ https://www.mobilize.us/2020victoryvp/event/322975/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=72fa7c8fe1&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **Make Calls to Help Recruit Other Voter Protection Team Members!** **Who: 2020 Victory Voter Protection - multiple states + national hotline team** **When: Varies, typically afternoons or evenings** **What is the work: Help us elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by making calls to others to help us recruit more poll observers in key states, get more help on the national voter assistance hotline and get people signed up for trainings.** **Why is it urgent: We still need thousands more voter protection team members ready to help ensure eligible voters can cast a ballot. There are only a few weeks left to recruit the additional help we need. Join us for a phone bank to help with this effort! This work is critical to electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats up and down the ballot!** **Length of Commitment: 2 hours** **Sign Up Here:** **MI:[ https://www.mobilize.us/midemsvopro/event/309344/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=667c879c4b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **FL:[ https://www.mobilize.us/flavopro/event/324712/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=433925b50c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **CO:[ https://www.mobilize.us/co2020victoryvp/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=62d5fb74af&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **IA:[ https://www.mobilize.us/ia2020victoryvp/event/326551/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d421947cfb&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **PA:[ https://www.mobilize.us/padems/event/305128/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fb06ca5c0c&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **NC:[ https://www.mobilize.us/ncdems/event/272724/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=89c4132ed6&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **OH:[ https://www.mobilize.us/ohdems/event/294061/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d47155e818&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **TX:[ https://www.mobilize.us/tdporganizing/event/290763/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=72f535f2a1&e=d6c5c7d7ec)** **National Hotline:[ https://www.mobilize.us/2020victoryvp/event/328173/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=25116fad52&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**Phone Banking Opportunities **
* **Veterans Military Families and Friends 4:30 to 6:00pm EST every Monday through November 2. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a487083726&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Women for Biden Weekly Phone Bank- Women across the United States come together to phone bank for Vice President Joe Biden! This phone bank includes a short training at the beginning of the event. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3332d35fea&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Women for Biden: Millennials & Gen Z Weekly phone bank-Join young women from across the country every Wednesday night at 8pm ET for a virtual phone bank to help elect Joe Biden. Training will be provided every Wednesday at the start of the call. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e8a874a2f4&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Texas Muslim Phonebanking for Biden. Every Tuesday through November 3. Register[here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=21a085859a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
* **National AAPIs for Biden Weekly Call & AAPIs Assemble! Join Asian Americans & Pacific Islanders (AAPIs) for Biden every Wednesday through Election Day, as we come together--or Assemble! to hear from leaders and surrogates from the AAPI community during our National AAPI Program at 7:00 PM ET/ 4:00 PM PT. Every Wednesday through November 3. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1ce95911fd&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Boricuas con Biden (Florida Phone bank). Join Boricuas with Biden to remove Trump from the White House one call at a time. Every Thursday and Friday from 6 - 8 p.m. (ET) we will be making calls to Puerto Rican homes in Florida to speak with our community and invite them to register, vote by mail, and support Joe Biden as our next President. For more information, please contact Roberto J. Nava ([roberto.nava.alsina@2020victory.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ae40e5dc4f&e=d6c5c7d7ec)) or write to any of our Boricua con Biden social media groups. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=dd6577bbf0&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Spanish-language voter contact events (Phone banks, text banks). Join various Spanish language events across the US, including phone banks, text banks, house parties and planning meetings with Latino communities. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=29cb395f38&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Latino Victory & Todos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1a871df8fc&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Dominicanos con Biden Bilingual Phone Bank hosted by Joe Biden for President. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=98fd230387&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**
* **Venezolanos con Biden: Haz Llamadas a Florida! Virtual Phone Bank. Join the Venezolanos con Biden team every Saturday from 2-4pm ET and make phone calls to voters in South Florida to support Joe Biden and all Democrats on the ballot. In this online event we will provide phone banking training and then we'll start making calls! We will have a facilitator to answer any questions for the duration of the phone bank. We will make calls into South Florida to Spanish and English speaking voters. Every vote counts and every call made brings us closer to victory in November. Volunteer with us and help us create change! Every Saturday at 2pm ET. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9209e43c62&e=d6c5c7d7ec). **
* **Texas Latino Voter Registration Assistance Virtual Community Event Hosted by the Texas Democratic Party with the help of amazing volunteers that want to see the poder of Latinos grow, we will be hosting Texas Voter Registration Office Hours (Horas de Oficina Asesoría para Registro de Votantes) in English and Español. If you have voter registration questions, please feel free to join this meeting at a time that is convenient for you. We have English and Spanish speakers available between 6:00pm – 8:00pm and we are ready to help. Register [here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d09fed8fb5&e=d6c5c7d7ec).**

| **TALKERS MESSAGING TOPLINES** _**Supreme Court **_ **TOPLINE: Justice Ginsburg’s successor will have a profound impact on every part of our lives and our future. The American people have a right to have a say who the Supreme Court Justice is. They aren’t getting that chance. We are in the middle of an election. Tens of thousands have already voted. We should wait and see what the outcome is. **
* **For voters, this isn’t about who is sitting on the Court, it’s about the issues that hang in the balance: health care, clean air and water, whether you make equal pay for equal work and the rights of voters, immigrants, women, and workers.**
* **Amy Coney Barrett has a written track record of disagreeing with the U.S. Supreme Court’s decision upholding the Affordable Care Act. She critiqued Chief Justice John Roberts’ majority opinion upholding the law in 2012. **
* **President Trump is right now fighting in the Supreme Court to strip health coverage away from millions of people in the middle of a global health crisis. The Supreme Court has twice already upheld the Affordable Care Act as constitutional.**
* **If Trump succeeds and his appointment votes to scrap the entire Affordable Care Act - insurers could once again discriminate or drop coverage completely for more than 100 million people living with preexisting conditions. Including the 7 million Americans who may have lung scarring and heart damage from COVID-19. **
* **The majority of the American people believe the winner of the election should nominate Justice Ginsburg's successor. **
* **Millions of voters are already casting their ballots. They should have their voices heard on who serves on the Court. **

_**Health Care**_ **TOPLINE: President Trump has no health care plan - he wants to take it away. He is right now fighting in the Supreme Court to eliminate the entire Affordable Care Act If he succeeds, he will strip health coverage away from tens of millions of families and to strip away the peace of mind from more than 100 million people with pre-existing conditions.**
* **If President Trump has his way, complications from COVID-19 will be the next deniable pre-existing conditions. **
* **Since he started running for President, Trump said that he will have a plan to replace the Affordable Care Act and that he’ll have a plan to protect pre-existing conditions. He’s had four years to level with the American people and put forward a plan. Now 40 days to the Election, he’s once again saying trust me - I’ll figure it out later.**
* **Simply put: Trump doesn’t have a plan. His only plan he has is to get re-elected.**
* **There is only one candidate in the race who fought shoulder to shoulder with President Obama to expand access to health care for more than 20 million Americans and to protect more than 100 million Americans with pre-existing conditions - That’s Joe Biden. And as President, he will build on that work.**

_**COVID-19**_ **200,000 people are dead and 7 million are infected in the United States. We have 4% of the world population and are at 20% of the deaths. And as 1,000 Americans die every day, President Trump says, “It is what it is.” Well “it is what it is” because President Trump you are who you are.** **This is the man who said it would be gone by Easter. He said it would go away when it got warm. He said it would end like a miracle. Why would you believe his promises now? Joe Biden trusts scientists. He trusts vaccines. But he does not trust Donald Trump. ** **TOPLINE: President Trump failed in the primary responsibility of the President: the duty to protect the safety of the American people. Even worse, he lied to the American people about the danger posed by COVID-19. Trump said he didn’t tell people the truth because he didn't want them to panic. The only person to panic was Donald Trump. He froze in the headlights, and the results were catastrophic for American families.**
* **200,000 people have died, 30 million are out of work and Trump failed to do his job. **
* **How many families are missing a loved one at their dinner table – because of his failures?**
* **No President whose lies and failures have cost 200,000 Americans their lives should keep his job. Period.**
* **If Biden were president now, here’s what he would do: **
**1) Everyone in this country would be wearing a mask when around other people. **
**2) He’d get the testing fiasco fixed. **
**3) Biden would get protective gear to everyone on the front lines**
**4) And he’d issue guidelines for our schools and businesses, and get them aid to implement them. **
* **Those are four things Trump isn’t doing, and doesn’t have any intention of doing. **
* **Tragically, if we continue on the path Trump is on, the worst is not behind us, it’s ahead.**

_**Park Avenue vs. Scranton**_ **TOPLINE: Biden sees this election as Park Avenue versus Scranton. President Trump can see only as far as Wall Street, and looks down on working people. Biden will build our country back better to help working families, not the super-wealthy and corporations.**
* **Joe Biden knows that Wall Street bankers and CEOs didn’t build this country — the middle class and working families did — hardworking people from Scranton and Claymont, small businesses and entrepreneurs and unions built this country. **
* **The question for voters across the country: is the Trump economy working for YOU and YOUR FAMILY? **
* **President Trump has no intention of making it better for you and your family at home. **
* **The top 100 billionaires in America have made more than $300 billion this year. **
* **President Trump wants to give them a $30 billion tax break. He's going to cut their tax rate so they pay a lower rate than a working family making $65,000 a year. **
* **Biden is going to make the super-wealthy pay their fair share. And, he’s going to:**
* **Enforce “Buy American” rules – for real - so that when we spend American taxpayer dollars it’s on goods made in America -- and penalize companies that ship jobs overseas. **
* **Create more jobs by investing in clean energy – windmills and solar plants and electric cars. **
* **Raise pay for child care workers and teachers and health care workers.**
* **Moody’s Analytics released their[ analysis of both Joe Biden and President Trump’s economic plans](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ccbbc95113&e=d6c5c7d7ec)\- or as we like to say, the Scranton plan vs. the Park Avenue plan. **
* **Key finding of the analysis is that Joe Biden is the jobs creator. **
* **Moody’s found that Biden’s plan will create 18.6 million jobs by the end of his first term -- 7 million *more* jobs than President Trump’s plan. **
* **Biden’s plan will grow the economy by almost $1 trillion more than Trump’s by 2024.**
* **Biden is the one with the strategic plan to grow our economy by investing in working families and our infrastructure. His plan will lead to higher homeownership and billions in more disposable income for American families. That’s what makes our economy healthy in the long-run.**
* **Trump only looks out for the super-wealthy and that doesn’t work for the economy in the long run. **

_**President Trump’s Taxes**_ **TOPLINE: President Trump can see only as far as Wall Street, and looks down on working people. If you make under $400,000, you will not pay a penny more in taxes when Joe Biden is president. Period. Contrast that with President Trump who now in the middle of this pandemic is proposing another tax giveaway for the wealthiest Americans. **
* **Trump’s tax giveaway went to the super-wealthy and corporations.**
* **83% of the benefits will ultimately go to the top 1% and 40% of the benefits went to foreign investors.**
* **91 Fortune 500 companies paid no federal taxes last year. **
* **The top 100 billionaires in America have made more than $300 billion this year. Donald Trump wants to give them a $30 billion tax break -- in the middle of a pandemic and an economic crisis. **
* **$30 billion more, just for those 100 folks. Trump is going to cut the super wealthy’s tax rate so they pay a lower rate than a working family making $65,000 a year. **
* **Joe Biden will make the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share, and invest that revenue in the middle class and growing our economy - expanding access to affordable health care, making community college tuition-free, investing in our public schools, repairing our roads and bridges, and more. **

* **Joe Biden is proposing tax cuts for working families:**
* **As long as the COVID crisis rages, he will expand the Child Tax Credit to help families. That means a firefighter with three teenagers will receive an additional $3,000 -- or $9,000 total. **
* **He’ll expand tax credits for child care, which could mean up to $6,800 in additional tax relief each year for such families.**
* **He’ll give first-time homebuyers a $15,000 advanceable tax credit for their down payment.**
* **And, he’ll increase tax credits to lower health care premiums, too.**

_**Donald Trump and Race**_ **Trump had multiple chances to say he disowned white supremacy. He refused. Donald Trump fans the flame of white supremacy and racism. It’s his only political strategy. ** **Equity, equality, and justice – the American creed. We have never lived up to it; but we’ve never stopped trying until this President.** **Joe Biden got into this race because of Charlottesville. After seeing hate-filled men with torches spilled out of the woods spewing racism and anti-Semitic bile, Donald Trump said there were “very fine people on both sides.” Those words shocked our conscience and stunned the world. ** **This summer, after George Floyd was killed, President Trump hid in the White House bunker. Then he ordered force against peaceful protestors outside the White House, gassing Americans to stage a photo op of him holding a Bible outside a church. ** **1 in 1000 African Americans has been killed by COVID-19, and if Trump doesn't do something fast by the end of year, it will be 1 in 500. This man has done virtually nothing for Black Americans. ** **TOPLINE: President Trump turns Americans against each other and fuels toxic racism for his own political gain. He has no desire to unite Americans to move our country forward. Division is his primary political strategy. It’s wrong, and it’s not who we are as a country. **
* **After neo Nazis and white supremacists marched in Charlottesville, he said there were “very fine people on both sides.”**
* **Following the tragic murder of George Floyd, as millions of Americans stood up for healing and justice, Trump actively fanned hate and even encouraged violence.**
* **Hate crimes have surged on his watch, he has admitted that he’s trying to keep Black Americans from exercising their sacred right to vote, slandered the Latino community, sought to bar Muslims from even entering the United States, presided over a spike in anti-Semitism, and regularly tries to scapegoat fellow Americans as “the other” in order to distract from his massive failures.**

_**Law and Order with Justice **_ **TOPLINE: Law and order with justice - where everyone is treated fairly. Donald Trump isn’t a law and order president. He’s a president who breaks the law and creates disorder. Joe Biden has condemned violence in every form it takes – while President Trump has failed to stand up to his own supporters and unequivocally condemn violence. Does anyone believe there will be less violence in America if Donald Trump is reelected?**
* **When President Trump says, “You won’t be safe in Joe Biden’s America,” he’s talking about what’s happening in President Trump’s America. **
* **President Trump failed to protect America so now he is trying to scare America. **
* **He owns this chaos yet proudly touts himself as a ‘law and order’ president. **
* **When President Trump says “you won’t be safe in Joe Biden’s America”, look around at President Trump’s America: **
* **COVID runs unchecked throughout the country and has killed thousands while sending our economy spiraling. **
* **The murder rate is up 26% in cities across the nation under Donald Trump. **
* **More cops have died of COVID-19 this year than on patrol. **
* **President Trump continues to fan the flames of division and encourage chaos. **

* **We must stand against violence – in every form it takes:**
* **The violence of unwarranted police shootings, excessive force, of extremists, and more. **
* **The senseless violence of looting and burning and destruction of property.**

* **When President Trump looks at this violence and sees a political lifeline. Joe Biden is offering a different vision. He’s going to bring Americans together to address the challenges our country faces. **

_**Climate Change**_ **When Donald Trump thinks of climate he thinks “hoax”. When Joe Biden thinks of climate change, he thinks jobs- good paying union jobs. ** **And Joe Biden will rejoin the Paris Climate Accord because without us it’s falling apart. He’ll host a summit for the world’s leading emitters in his first 100 days, and persuade them to up the ante, and increase their emissions goals.** **TOPLINE:**
* **As a nation, we face one of the most difficult moments in our history. Four historic crises. COVID, the economy, racial justice and climate change - all at the same time. **
* **Once again, President Trump fails the most basic duty to this nation -- he fails to protect us. We are not safe in President Trump’s America. **
* **Wildfires are burning the suburbs in the West. Floods are wiping out suburban neighborhoods in the Midwest. And, hurricanes are imperiling suburban life along our coasts. The impacts of climate change don't pick and choose red states or blue states. **
* **Which makes President Trump’s climate denialism — his disdain of science and facts — all the more confounding.**
* **The unrelenting impact of climate change affects every single one of us. But too often the brunt falls disproportionately on communities of color, exacerbating the need for environmental justice.**
* **Every American has a fundamental right to breathe clean air and drink clean water.**
* **Our economy can’t recover if we don’t build back with more resiliency to withstand extreme weather that will only come with more frequency.**
* **When President Trump thinks of climate change, he thinks hoax. When Joe Biden thinks of climate change, he thinks jobs - good paying union jobs. **
* **We need a president who respects science, who understands that the damage from climate change is already here, and, unless we take urgent action, will soon be more catastrophic. A president who recognizes, understands, and cares that Americans are dying. **
* **As President, Biden will send Congress in the first 100 Days a sweeping plan for a clean-energy revolution: **

* **Build a 100%-clean-energy economy – creating millions of jobs to power our recovery.**
* **Invest record amounts in research and innovation – more than we spent to put a man on the moon.**
* **Build a more resilient infrastructure, more efficient power grid, and 500,000 public charging stations for electric cars. **

_**Voting**_ **President Trump is using scare tactics to undermine voting-by-mail. But the truth is: Trump himself just voted-by-mail in Florida’s primary, and his campaign is promoting it for its own supporters.** **Our military has been voting by mail since the Civil War. ** **Joe Biden refuses to let Donald Trump undermine faith in our democracy.** **If President Trump says he won't accept the results of the election it doesn't matter. If we get the votes, he has to go.** **The American people have it in our power to determine what’s going to happen and if we want four more years of these lies.** **Go to[ IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a4222e01a3&e=d6c5c7d7ec) right now to make a plan to vote early. ** **TOPLINE: The American people are going to vote and determine the next President of the United States. **
* **The Biden campaign has launched the biggest voter protection program in history: thousands of staff on the ground, lawyers, and poll watchers throughout the states to ensure every eligible voter who wants to can do so. **
* **The campaign is aggressively answering efforts by Trump and his allies here at home and overseas to suppress voting. **
* **This includes: **
* **State programs-- recruiting and ensuring poll workers and safe polling locations. **
* **Anti-voter suppression programs-- preventing Republicans from putting up obstacles to voting and from using supposed emergency powers to intimidate voters and attack or subvert our democratic processes. **
* **Voter registration and education programs-- registering voters, and ensuring they have the information they need to vote by mail or in person. **
* **Guarding against foreign interference and cyberattacks-- protecting against abuse of platforms and voter misinformation from domestic and foreign sources. **

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends- Presidential debates are about having a discussion around competing visions and plans for the country explained, deconstructed and evaluated. What we witnessed last night was the President of the United States devolving the format into a barrage of , , and a round-up posse to the Proud Boys that they were so delighted to receive, they’ve updated their . After sifting through a lot of the feedback and social and the headlines today, there are some takeaways that we need your help in doing. A lot of people went to bed upset but fired up to see Trump go. Don’t miss that last part in seeing this as an organizing moment. Because there was only one leader on the stage of last night’s Presidential debate, and that leader was Vice President Joe Biden. That leader stood up for our lives under the mismanagement of this pandemic and the economy, called out racism and fought to focus on the welfare of our families even as attacks were unleashed against his own family. Trump had no plan, and Vice President Biden him about that fact. He told a host of lies during the debate on , , , and but there was one moment when he finally admitted his plans to cut health care. He said outright “.” We’ve known all along that health care was on the ballot and he has just confirmed it. The time is now for us to ensure that the folks with knots in their stomachs remember that people have already been voting in record numbers and they are cutting our way disproportionately. The goal right now is to keep turning people out, helping them to get good information on how to vote (), and to keep scaling up our voter protection efforts. Last night’s debate gave us additional fuel and urgency. We need to get our communities to vote and vote early. Trump has given the orders to a known hate group to “”. They have their orders. But as Princess Philomena Desmond, who is one of the Co-Chairs of the African Diaspora for Biden, said to me today, “Our Joe struck back and he spoke directly to the people which Trump never did. But we have to be prepared for the days ahead”. Mama Philomena, I agree. So folks please read down for some of our asks. We will send out information again next Wednesday, October 7th for the Vice Presidential debate. Simply put: Trump doesn’t have a plan. His only plan he has is to get re-elected. There is only one candidate in the race who fought shoulder to shoulder with President Obama to expand access to health care for more than 20 million Americans and to protect more than 100 million Americans with pre-existing conditions - That’s Joe Biden. And as President, he will build on that work. COVID-19 200,000 people are dead and 7 million are infected in the United States. We have 4% of the world population and are at 20% of the deaths. And as 1,000 Americans die every day, President Trump says, “It is what it is.” Well “it is what it is” because President Trump you are who you are. This is the man who said it would be gone by Easter. He said it would go away when it got warm. He said it would end like a miracle. Why would you believe his promises now? Joe Biden trusts scientists. He trusts vaccines. But he does not trust Donald Trump. TOPLINE: President Trump failed in the primary responsibility of the President: the duty to protect the safety of the American people. Even worse, he lied to the American people about the danger posed by COVID-19. Trump said he didn’t tell people the truth because he didn't want them to panic. The only person to panic was Donald Trump. He froze in the headlights, and the results were catastrophic for American families. 200,000 people have died, 30 million are out of work and Trump failed to do his job. How many families are missing a loved one at their dinner table – because of his failures? No President whose lies and failures have cost 200,000 Americans their lives should keep his job. Period. If Biden were president now, here’s what he would do: 1) Everyone in this country would be wearing a mask when around other people. 2) He’d get the testing fiasco fixed. 3) Biden would get protective gear to everyone on the front lines 4) And he’d issue guidelines for our schools and businesses, and get them aid to implement them. Those are four things Trump isn’t doing, and doesn’t have any intention of doing. Tragically, if we continue on the path Trump is on, the worst is not behind us, it’s ahead. Park Avenue vs. Scranton TOPLINE: Biden sees this election as Park Avenue versus Scranton. President Trump can see only as far as Wall Street, and looks down on working people. Biden will build our country back better to help working families, not the super-wealthy and corporations. Joe Biden knows that Wall Street bankers and CEOs didn’t build this country — the middle class and working families did — hardworking people from Scranton and Claymont, small businesses and entrepreneurs and unions built this country. The question for voters across the country: is the Trump economy working for YOU and YOUR FAMILY? President Trump has no intention of making it better for you and your family at home. The top 100 billionaires in America have made more than $300 billion this year. President Trump wants to give them a $30 billion tax break. He's going to cut their tax rate so they pay a lower rate than a working family making $65,000 a year. Biden is going to make the super-wealthy pay their fair share. And, he’s going to: Enforce “Buy American” rules – for real - so that when we spend American taxpayer dollars it’s on goods made in America -- and penalize companies that ship jobs overseas. Create more jobs by investing in clean energy – windmills and solar plants and electric cars. Raise pay for child care workers and teachers and health care workers. Moody’s Analytics released their\- or as we like to say, the Scranton plan vs. the Park Avenue plan. Key finding of the analysis is that Joe Biden is the jobs creator. Moody’s found that Biden’s plan will create 18.6 million jobs by the end of his first term -- 7 million more jobs than President Trump’s plan. Biden’s plan will grow the economy by almost $1 trillion more than Trump’s by 2024. Biden is the one with the strategic plan to grow our economy by investing in working families and our infrastructure. His plan will lead to higher homeownership and billions in more disposable income for American families. That’s what makes our economy healthy in the long-run. Trump only looks out for the super-wealthy and that doesn’t work for the economy in the long run. President Trump’s Taxes TOPLINE: President Trump can see only as far as Wall Street, and looks down on working people. If you make under $400,000, you will not pay a penny more in taxes when Joe Biden is president. Period. Contrast that with President Trump who now in the middle of this pandemic is proposing another tax giveaway for the wealthiest Americans. Trump’s tax giveaway went to the super-wealthy and corporations. 83% of the benefits will ultimately go to the top 1% and 40% of the benefits went to foreign investors. 91 Fortune 500 companies paid no federal taxes last year. The top 100 billionaires in America have made more than $300 billion this year. Donald Trump wants to give them a $30 billion tax break -- in the middle of a pandemic and an economic crisis. $30 billion more, just for those 100 folks. Trump is going to cut the super wealthy’s tax rate so they pay a lower rate than a working family making $65,000 a year. Joe Biden will make the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share, and invest that revenue in the middle class and growing our economy - expanding access to affordable health care, making community college tuition-free, investing in our public schools, repairing our roads and bridges, and more. Joe Biden is proposing tax cuts for working families: As long as the COVID crisis rages, he will expand the Child Tax Credit to help families. That means a firefighter with three teenagers will receive an additional $3,000 -- or $9,000 total. He’ll expand tax credits for child care, which could mean up to $6,800 in additional tax relief each year for such families. He’ll give first-time homebuyers a $15,000 advanceable tax credit for their down payment. And, he’ll increase tax credits to lower health care premiums, too. Donald Trump and Race Trump had multiple chances to say he disowned white supremacy. He refused. Donald Trump fans the flame of white supremacy and racism. It’s his only political strategy. Equity, equality, and justice – the American creed. We have never lived up to it; but we’ve never stopped trying until this President. Joe Biden got into this race because of Charlottesville. After seeing hate-filled men with torches spilled out of the woods spewing racism and anti-Semitic bile, Donald Trump said there were “very fine people on both sides.” Those words shocked our conscience and stunned the world. This summer, after George Floyd was killed, President Trump hid in the White House bunker. Then he ordered force against peaceful protestors outside the White House, gassing Americans to stage a photo op of him holding a Bible outside a church. 1 in 1000 African Americans has been killed by COVID-19, and if Trump doesn't do something fast by the end of year, it will be 1 in 500. This man has done virtually nothing for Black Americans. TOPLINE: President Trump turns Americans against each other and fuels toxic racism for his own political gain. He has no desire to unite Americans to move our country forward. Division is his primary political strategy. It’s wrong, and it’s not who we are as a country. After neo Nazis and white supremacists marched in Charlottesville, he said there were “very fine people on both sides.” Following the tragic murder of George Floyd, as millions of Americans stood up for healing and justice, Trump actively fanned hate and even encouraged violence. Hate crimes have surged on his watch, he has admitted that he’s trying to keep Black Americans from exercising their sacred right to vote, slandered the Latino community, sought to bar Muslims from even entering the United States, presided over a spike in anti-Semitism, and regularly tries to scapegoat fellow Americans as “the other” in order to distract from his massive failures. Law and Order with Justice TOPLINE: Law and order with justice - where everyone is treated fairly. Donald Trump isn’t a law and order president. He’s a president who breaks the law and creates disorder. Joe Biden has condemned violence in every form it takes – while President Trump has failed to stand up to his own supporters and unequivocally condemn violence. Does anyone believe there will be less violence in America if Donald Trump is reelected? When President Trump says, “You won’t be safe in Joe Biden’s America,” he’s talking about what’s happening in President Trump’s America. President Trump failed to protect America so now he is trying to scare America. He owns this chaos yet proudly touts himself as a ‘law and order’ president. When President Trump says “you won’t be safe in Joe Biden’s America”, look around at President Trump’s America: COVID runs unchecked throughout the country and has killed thousands while sending our economy spiraling. The murder rate is up 26% in cities across the nation under Donald Trump. More cops have died of COVID-19 this year than on patrol. President Trump continues to fan the flames of division and encourage chaos. We must stand against violence – in every form it takes: The violence of unwarranted police shootings, excessive force, of extremists, and more. The senseless violence of looting and burning and destruction of property. When President Trump looks at this violence and sees a political lifeline. Joe Biden is offering a different vision. He’s going to bring Americans together to address the challenges our country faces. Climate Change When Donald Trump thinks of climate he thinks “hoax”. When Joe Biden thinks of climate change, he thinks jobs- good paying union jobs. And Joe Biden will rejoin the Paris Climate Accord because without us it’s falling apart. He’ll host a summit for the world’s leading emitters in his first 100 days, and persuade them to up the ante, and increase their emissions goals. TOPLINE: As a nation, we face one of the most difficult moments in our history. Four historic crises. COVID, the economy, racial justice and climate change - all at the same time. Once again, President Trump fails the most basic duty to this nation -- he fails to protect us. We are not safe in President Trump’s America. Wildfires are burning the suburbs in the West. Floods are wiping out suburban neighborhoods in the Midwest. And, hurricanes are imperiling suburban life along our coasts. The impacts of climate change don't pick and choose red states or blue states. Which makes President Trump’s climate denialism — his disdain of science and facts — all the more confounding. The unrelenting impact of climate change affects every single one of us. But too often the brunt falls disproportionately on communities of color, exacerbating the need for environmental justice. Every American has a fundamental right to breathe clean air and drink clean water. Our economy can’t recover if we don’t build back with more resiliency to withstand extreme weather that will only come with more frequency. When President Trump thinks of climate change, he thinks hoax. When Joe Biden thinks of climate change, he thinks jobs - good paying union jobs. We need a president who respects science, who understands that the damage from climate change is already here, and, unless we take urgent action, will soon be more catastrophic. A president who recognizes, understands, and cares that Americans are dying. As President, Biden will send Congress in the first 100 Days a sweeping plan for a clean-energy revolution: Build a 100%-clean-energy economy – creating millions of jobs to power our recovery. Invest record amounts in research and innovation – more than we spent to put a man on the moon. Build a more resilient infrastructure, more efficient power grid, and 500,000 public charging stations for electric cars. Voting President Trump is using scare tactics to undermine voting-by-mail. But the truth is: Trump himself just voted-by-mail in Florida’s primary, and his campaign is promoting it for its own supporters. Our military has been voting by mail since the Civil War. Joe Biden refuses to let Donald Trump undermine faith in our democracy. If President Trump says he won't accept the results of the election it doesn't matter. If we get the votes, he has to go. The American people have it in our power to determine what’s going to happen and if we want four more years of these lies. Go to right now to make a plan to vote early. TOPLINE: The American people are going to vote and determine the next President of the United States. The Biden campaign has launched the biggest voter protection program in history: thousands of staff on the ground, lawyers, and poll watchers throughout the states to ensure every eligible voter who wants to can do so. The campaign is aggressively answering efforts by Trump and his allies here at home and overseas to suppress voting. This includes: State programs-- recruiting and ensuring poll workers and safe polling locations. Anti-voter suppression programs-- preventing Republicans from putting up obstacles to voting and from using supposed emergency powers to intimidate voters and attack or subvert our democratic processes. Voter registration and education programs-- registering voters, and ensuring they have the information they need to vote by mail or in person. Guarding against foreign interference and cyberattacks-- protecting against abuse of platforms and voter misinformation from domestic and foreign sources. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | iwillvote.com | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com DNC Community Engagement 430 S Capitol Street, SE Washington, DC 20003 USA

subject: I'll make this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:

Let me get right to the point, Peter:
**Our deadline to meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal is tonight at midnight.**
We're still $5,219 away from reaching our big $50,000 milestone. Can you help me get there?
**[We need to meet this goal to keep our campaign on track, keep Illinois blue, and flip the Senate. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: this is the last one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
This is the final email you will receive from me or my team about our end-of-quarter goal.
We are only $3,028 away from meeting this crucial goal ahead of the midnight deadline.
**[I know that if my top supporters dig deep, we can get to $25,000 before midnight. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford to get us to the finish line?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200926-eoq?refcode=em200930i-pm_4642&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I am doing everything I personally can to ensure Democrats win the 2020 fight -- from keeping Nevada blue to electing a Democratic Senate and sending Joe Biden to the White House.
But our efforts go so much further when we stand together. That's why I'm so proud of this grassroots team for stepping up and joining this must-win fight for our country's future.
**[I'm asking one more time: will you donate $5 before midnight?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200926-eoq?refcode=em200930i-pm_4642&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for your support,
Jacky

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Saddle up, y'all 🐴
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're closing out this chapter of the campaign and pushing into the final one.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cc4/7f51f7bc/44344cb7/4efa4dce/3241473964/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Taylor on my finance team tells me that we are SO CLOSE to reaching our $200,000 End-of-Quarter goal, but we're not quite there yet!

This is our FINAL quarterly goal deadline before voting starts, so we have to blow it out of the water. Soon next month, our fundraising numbers will be made public, and I want everyone to know just how strong this team is.

**[Make a DOUBLE MATCHED donation before midnight tonight to pitch in!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cc4/7f51f7bc/44344cb7/4efa4dcd/3241473964/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-septEOQdouble?refcode=email_20200930.4nd__2217__&amount=10")**

You and I both know that we've got Sen. Cornyn on the ropes, and he's having to call in favors from his buddies in Washington because he knows he could lose. Texans are fed up with his BS, and they've seen just how incompetent he's been -- on COVID-19 relief, on health care, on immigration reform, and on standing up to Mitch McConnell.

We've been through a lot the past few months. We've talked with hundreds of thousands, called and texted millions of voters, broken our fundraising records, and broken them again.

We witnessed Sen. Cornyn's complete incompetence -- listening flabbergasted as he tried to tell us that we don't know if kids can get and transmit COVID-19. We called on him to stand up to a Commander-in-Chief who referred to brave service members as "suckers and losers," and tens of thousands of passionate Americans joined our grassroots army to protect the legacy of Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

Together, we can make history and take on Sen. Cornyn, Mitch McConnell, and all of their special interest bosses. **[Can I count on you to make a DOUBLE MATCHED donation today and triple your impact?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cc4/7f51f7bc/44344cb7/4efa4dcd/3241473964/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-septEOQdouble?refcode=email_20200930.4nd__2217__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

clean_body: We're closing out this chapter of the campaign and pushing into the final one. | "" | | Peter, Taylor on my finance team tells me that we are SO CLOSE to reaching our $200,000 End-of-Quarter goal, but we're not quite there yet! This is our FINAL quarterly goal deadline before voting starts, so we have to blow it out of the water. Soon next month, our fundraising numbers will be made public, and I want everyone to know just how strong this team is. "" You and I both know that we've got Sen. Cornyn on the ropes, and he's having to call in favors from his buddies in Washington because he knows he could lose. Texans are fed up with his BS, and they've seen just how incompetent he's been -- on COVID-19 relief, on health care, on immigration reform, and on standing up to Mitch McConnell. We've been through a lot the past few months. We've talked with hundreds of thousands, called and texted millions of voters, broken our fundraising records, and broken them again. We witnessed Sen. Cornyn's complete incompetence -- listening flabbergasted as he tried to tell us that we don't know if kids can get and transmit COVID-19. We called on him to stand up to a Commander-in-Chief who referred to brave service members as "suckers and losers," and tens of thousands of passionate Americans joined our grassroots army to protect the legacy of Ruth Bader Ginsburg. Together, we can make history and take on Sen. Cornyn, Mitch McConnell, and all of their special interest bosses. "" | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Saddle up, Peter, we've got work to do. \-- MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. body:
We’re just a few hours away from final quarterly fundraising deadline and I can’t believe we’re still short of our goal.
Peter,We're just a few hours away from final quarterly fundraising deadline and I can't believe we're still short of our goal. We can't compete unless supporters like you step up right now. name: Senator Mike Braun
subject: Debate Trainwreck
body:
My thoughts on the debate last night No images? [Click here](https://mbfi.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xamik-vkreeut-j/) Wow. Did you watch last night's debate?President Trump was outnumbered 2-1 between Biden and the moderator. But Trump fought through the interruptions from Chris Wallace and confusion from Biden to present the American people with a clear choice:**Stay the winning course with President Trump 's Keep America Great agenda, confirm more conservative judges, and return to massive economic growth ... or follow Hidin' Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Radical Left into ruin.**The Democrats want to defund the police, end private health care, open our borders, and obliterate the Constitution by packing the Supreme Court with liberal judges.**America's future is on the line for our kids and grandkids. We need to stand with President Trump. **We have a lot to do to get our message out and voting has already started in some states. Can you contribute today and help us stand up to the radical left? subject: Are you Registered?
body:
There are 36 Days left until Election Day and only 23 until in person Early Voting Begins, do you know if you are registered to vote? | |
---
| | |
## _Always working for You_
With 35 days until the Election, everything we've worked for is on the line. From the Smart529 and WVABLE programs to the more that $250 million dollars in returned unclaimed property, I've never forgotten that I work for you!

For me, West Virginia has always been home, and I know the people of my state value honesty, hard work, loyalty and decency. As your State Treasurer I have worked tirelessly for you, but today I need your help.

Time is of the essence and the window of opportunity is quickly drawing to a close. This campaign cycle is unlike any I've ever witnessed and without the ability to safely meet voters in person, we have turned to T.V. and social media to get our message out.

Will you invest in my race today? Your contribution will help us to reach every eligible voter in West Virginia and let them know all that that our office has done for the people.

Thank you & may you be healthy & safe during these uncertain times.
---
|

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Never Trust the Polls
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The media tells us that Biden won the debate. And the polls show him winning the November election. Just like they did with Hillary in 2016. Speaking of polls, did you know that Tim Walz' approval rating is still above 50%? Despite dropping 8 points in the last month, the polls say Minnesotans still support him. **One thing is for sure...never trust the polls!** We hear from hundreds of new Minnesotans every week who have been wronged by Governor Walz' abuse of emergency powers. From what we see, his popularity is dwindling faster than the Vikings' season. Legislators are going to be called back to the Capitol one more time before the election when Tyrant-wannabe Walz extends his "emergency" for another 30 days. That date will most likely be October 9th. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to donate to help shape the next month of politics. But first, let me explain the two scenarios that likely will occur. Scenario 1: The four Democrats needed to flip and vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers will see the writing on the wall from the heat we bring, and vote the right way. Then we go into November's election with a splintered Democrat party in Minnesota. Or... Scenario 2: The Democrats who are standing in the way of our liberties and economy will once again protect their Party's governor and vote against the End Walz' Powers Resolution. In that case, Action 4 Liberty takes our message directly to tens of thousands of voters in their districts so voters kick them out of office on November 3rd. Action 4 Liberty will play this commercial and others from now until election day if it comes down to that. [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=2) We're at a critical time in the battle to restore our liberties and End Walz' Emergency Powers. Everything that happens now will impact the important November election. We still need 4 Democrats to flip their vote if we want to End Walz' Powers. **Democrat politicians Brad Tabke, Dan Wolgamott, Rob Ecklund and Jeff Brand better vote for their people and not their Party's governor in October or they better start looking for another job!** Action 4 Liberty has the commercial, online ads, mailers and phone callers lined up and ready to go. [We are ready to launch a full on assault for our liberties, will you help](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=3)? Our message is going directly to voters in their districts so they know exactly how they are killing businesses and trampling on our civil liberties. As politicians like Brad Tabke are campaigning, we'll be there telling voters in 55A how Brad puts Walz ahead of them! _Walz is abusing his emergency powers and politicians like Brad Tabke are protecting him._ **Now I must ask for you help with a donation. Action 4 Liberty needs the resources to alert voters in Brad Tabke's district from now until election day that Tabke is killing small business and infringing on our liberties by protecting Tim Walz.** We need to inform voters in St Cloud about Dan Wolgamott, northern Minnesota about Rob Ecklund and southern Minnesota about Jeff Brand. Will you help us out?
## [SUPPORT ACTION 4 LIBERTY](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=4)
The Legislature will be back in session soon and we can't afford to not put**maximum pressure** on Tabke and the other Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters this election season by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=5 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=6)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on Brad Tabke and these other Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Let’s have them feel the political pain, instead of our beloved businesses.
When politicians see their friends like Brad Tabke suffer embarrassment in front of voters, it sends a strong message to their friends to not cross us. They either support liberty or we deliver the pain!
[**Please help us put the pressure on these politicians. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=7)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=october_surprise_retarget&n=10), software for leaders.

body:
We hit our goal! |
---
Friend -- **_We hit our goal!_**

We set an ambitious goal of raising $200,000 in grassroots donations by the end of the quarter, and this team SMASHED it! **THANK YOU!**

We passed this **_huge_** test of our campaign's strength. Friend, because of donations from people like you, we are showing everyone that our grassroots, people-powered movement can go toe to toe with Mitch McConnell and the GOP's big money machine.

**We have to keep up this momentum all the way through the last day of voting.**

**[With only a few weeks left in the campaign, we have to finish strong. Will you help get this last _full_ month started off on the right foot by chipping in $20 right now?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2e98/5b2c1286/3bfc66ed/25f27d81/691780285/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_10_01_thanks?refcode=em_2020_10_01_thanks&amount=20")**

name: Jason Yates
subject: Join Kirk Cameron and My Faith Votes For TBN's Two-Part Special: Think. Pray. Vote.
body:
| | Think. Pray. Vote. on TBN
---
| Peter, The November elections are just a month away, and if you’re feeling like me, you may need some biblical encouragement amid all the division and cutting rhetoric in these final weeks leading up to the election. **My Faith Votes is presenting a special two-part broadcast event, hosted by my friend Kirk Cameron, on the Trinity Broadcast Network (TBN) tomorrow night, Friday, October 2 and Friday, October 9 at 8/7C.** Kirk will provide insight and much-needed encouragement for Christians across the country. He will be joined by some of today's leading pastors and scholars to discuss important issues facing our nation through a Gospel lens. Special guests include Eric Metaxas, Harry Jackson, David Barton, Pastor Allen Jackson, Rev. Franklin Graham, Dr. Tony Evans, and many more! Check your local listings for the Trinity Broadcast Network (TBN) tomorrow evening to watch this special two-part broadcast. To receive a reminder to watch the event on October 2 and October 9 RSVP [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icjhge1_2flnyJ6PT0QN3hCAf_1t_xJsqltMJ5ksvsJqYDGcvR0DMezA3s_reY7TZg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201001com01&n=1). [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icjhge1_2flnyJ6PT0QN3hCAf_1t_xJsqltMJ5ksvsJqYDGcvR0DMezA3s_reY7TZg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201001com01&n=2) **United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201001com01&n=3)
