name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: We hit our goal
body:
We did it! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/612a08d9320c/we-hit-our-goal?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | I am overwhelmingly proud to tell you that we not only met our goal for yesterday’s deadline, but we blew past it.

That was the most money this campaign has raised in any quarter. In fact, nearly 2⁄3 of all the money we have throughout this campaign was from July through September. All thanks to small dollar donors like you.

It’s obvious that we have serious momentum. We have to keep it going all the way to Election Day. [Are you ready to have my back in October?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7c19b5791d&e=140a9b81e7)

I don’t accept any money from corporate PACs, so this is a 100% people-powered campaign. My opponent, sadly, is not the same way. Corporate money is already pouring into this district, funding ads for my opponent and launching false attacks on Democrats. But when the Republicans hear about us smashing our financial goal, they will funnel even more money into the coffers of my opponent.

That is why I need your help. [I need you to donate whatever you can spare so that I can keep competing with my opponent on the airwaves.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=9052977043&e=140a9b81e7)

We are SO close to Election Day, and I could not be more proud to be in this fight with each and every one of you.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

With your support, we had our best month ever for grassroots fundraising and surpassed our ambitious quarterly fundraising goal!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19798159/254497887/-613620204?refcode=em_ty_2020.10.01_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=1e6176ae-0f04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTYxNzZhZS0wZjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMU7m9RxoARxnoPNEC2xfKdmHV96e0XarkMTWaSqStI=) I couldn’t be prouder, friend.

**With your support, we had our best month ever for grassroots fundraising and surpassed our ambitious quarterly fundraising goal!**

With Election Day just 33 days away, this grassroots team has proven that we have the momentum to win, and I am so grateful to have you in my corner. _But the work doesn’t stop here, friend._

Scott Perry has been lying to voters and relying on big special interests to help him push a far-right agenda that does nothing but hurt our community. The people of South Central PA deserve better -- and together, _we can give them better._

**Friend, we have a tough fight ahead, and in the coming days and weeks, I’m going to ask you to step up like never before.** I can’t win this race alone -- it’s going to take the full strength of this grassroots movement to pull off a victory and flip this seat blue.

Friend,

Thanks to grassroots supporters here on the Suncoast, throughout Florida, and across the country who gave to our campaign leading up to our final end-of-quarter deadline, we met our ambitious $30,000 goal! Thank you.

This remarkable accomplishment shows once again that our campaign is strong and powered by the people, unlike our opponent’s campaign that is backed by corporate PACs.

We have a real path to flip this seat from red to blue, deliver accountability to Washington, and help turn out the voters that Joe Biden needs to win Florida and the White House.

It’s going to take a lot of work from now until Election Day to create this change, but I know we can do it. I’m grateful that you all are in this with me. Together, we are going to create the change we deserve. We have the power to do this -- and 34 more days to make it happen.

Thank you,

Margaret

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19798184/254497971/1073285021?refcode2=1e8981cf-0f04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emci=1d8981cf-0f04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=1e8981cf-0f04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&refcode=100120-es-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTg5ODFjZi0wZjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=exhQo1iZaFctJNmKc2N25T4Rrq4pmNZU6dEzRjXJJq4=)

Margaret Good for Congress

Sarasota, FL 34277

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! clean_body: Friend, Thanks to grassroots supporters here on the Suncoast, throughout Florida, and across the country who gave to our campaign leading up to our final end-of-quarter deadline, we met our ambitious $30,000 goal! Thank you. This remarkable accomplishment shows once again that our campaign is strong and powered by the people, unlike our opponent’s campaign that is backed by corporate PACs. We have a real path to flip this seat from red to blue, deliver accountability to Washington, and help turn out the voters that Joe Biden needs to win Florida and the White House. It’s going to take a lot of work from now until Election Day to create this change, but I know we can do it. I’m grateful that you all are in this with me. Together, we are going to create the change we deserve. We have the power to do this -- and 34 more days to make it happen. name: Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
subject: re: Help us get through the home stretch.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our generous donors just EXTENDED their match.
|
---

| | Derek --

Great news! Our donors have _**extended**_ their generous 2x matching until midnight tonight. That means you still have a chance to support Mark Warner -- and make your dollar stretch twice as far!

If you've been thinking about supporting Mark's campaign, now is the time. We're in the home stretch before Election Day, and every dollar helps us spread Mark's message further throughout the Commonwealth. **Your contribution helps us keep our TV ads on the air longer, expand our digital ad buying, and double down on our voter registration efforts.

[Can you chip in while we have our dollar-for-dollar match active?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da63/53d9897e/55be53a6/1c88e41e/2117669249/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-critical?refcode=20201001_f_1_nd__839__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director**
Subject: Help us get through the home stretch.
> Derek --
>
> I'm sure you're getting a lot of emails from folks trying to hit their end-of-quarter deadlines, so I will keep this as brief as possible. I'm going to ask you to chip in to support Mark Warner's re-election campaign as we head into the final stretch of this election, but first let me explain why.
>
> I've been on this team for a while now, and I've seen how hard Mark works. He's the kind of guy who will roll up his sleeves and work until the job is done, whether he's working across the aisle to make sure that Virginians have the resources they need to face the coronavirus pandemic or working to expand rural broadband coverage to make sure everyone has a fair shot to work and learn. His goal has _always_ been to make sure that everyone in the Commonwealth has equal access to opportunities and the resources they need to succeed -- no matter what their ZIP code is.
>
> As the finance director, I've gotten to see firsthand just how many Virginians are putting their trust in Mark Warner. We've seen campaign contributions from every corner of the Commonwealth, and we are so grateful for your support.
>
> This campaign is fueled by grassroots donors, and it's vitally important that we continue to hit our fundraising goals so that we can finish this race strong. That's why some generous donors have agreed to match your donation to help us reach this critical end-of-quarter goal, _**which means that your contribution counts as double right now**_**.[Can you chip in while we have our dollar-for-dollar match active?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da63/53d9897e/55be53a6/1c88e41d/2117669249/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-critical?refcode=20201001_f_1_nd__839__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
>
> If you've been thinking about chipping in, now is the time. Your money will go twice as far! We're less than 40 days away from Election Day, and this team is committed to continue to connect with voters and make sure that everyone turns out to keep Virginia blue.
>
> **[We can't do it without you -- can you help us meet our fundraising goal?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da63/53d9897e/55be53a6/1c88e41c/2117669249/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-critical?refcode=20201001_f_1_nd__839__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**
>
> Thank you for all of your support!
>
> -- Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da63/53d9897e/55be53a6/1c88e41b/2117669249/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgzOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-critical?refcode=20201001_f_1_nd__839__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Bill Olson
subject: STOP the Left's disgusting racist attacks on ACB!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I am thrilled with President Trumps' choosing Amy Coney Barrett for the Supreme Court, and I will fight the racist attacks being made against Judge Barrett!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

I have always said there is a disturbing racism about the thinking of the extreme Left- that their constant focus on the supposed "racism" of others is an act to distract from their own disgusting bigotry.

This week, I was proven sadly right.

I would have thought Pelosi and the far Left would have learned their lesson after their defeat in the Kavanaugh fiasco. Apparently not.

Liberals on social media are questioning whether two children adopted by President Trump’s expected Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, were adopted legitimately — as Senate Republicans leaped to defend her.

“Some adoptions from Haiti were legit. Many were sketchy as hell,” wrote a Democratic activist and former Capitol Hill staffer, Dana Houle, in a since-deleted tweet on Friday.

“Would it matter if her kids were scooped up by ultra-religious Americans, or ... when there was family in Haiti?”

Another left-wing activist, John Lee Brougher of the NextGen America PAC, added fuel to the fire.

“As an adoptee, I need to know more about the circumstances of how Amy Coney Barrett came to adopt her children, and the treatment of them since,” Brougher wrote, according to Breitbart News. “Transracial adoption is fraught with trauma and potential for harm.” Brougher’s tweet has also been removed.

These racist cowards didn't even have the guts to stand behind their woke racism. Others on the extreme Left, however, DID stand by their racist attacks- and are paid by major universities to do so.

Ibram X. Kendi, an American author who became the new director of the Center for Antiracist Research at Boston University in July, railed against Barrett on Twitter for adopting two Black children from Haiti, equating her and her husband to “White colonizers.”

“Some White colonizers ‘adopted’ Black children. They ‘civilized’ these ‘savage’ children in the ‘superior’ ways of White people, while using them as props in their lifelong pictures of denial, while cutting the biological parents of these children out of the picture of humanity,” Kendi wrote Saturday.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

I thought we were beyond this as a country, but maybe not.

The Left that commands Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have been murdering people, burning cities, and engaging in personal targeting (they call it "cancelling") for years.

This is good enough reason not to vote for any Democrat, on any level, this year. They won't condemn the disgusting treason and violence in their own ranks- including the racist attacks on Judge Barrett's family!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

How could you see a picture of the Barrett family and hate those children? Imagine how full of hate- extremist, ideological hate- you would have to be.

I am not full of hate, and I bet you aren't either. I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

If we want to stop Leftist racism, we must stand together NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations.

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=j54gd20mdF6OuRU&b=SJ36AREZEDtm4Pfo8Sj2pA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I am thrilled with President Trumps' choosing Amy Coney Barrett for the Supreme Court, and I will fight the racist attacks being made against Judge Barrett! I have always said there is a disturbing racism about the thinking of the extreme Left- that their constant focus on the supposed "racism" of others is an act to distract from their own disgusting bigotry. This week, I was proven sadly right. I would have thought Pelosi and the far Left would have learned their lesson after their defeat in the Kavanaugh fiasco. Apparently not. Liberals on social media are questioning whether two children adopted by President Trump’s expected Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, were adopted legitimately — as Senate Republicans leaped to defend her. “Some adoptions from Haiti were legit. Many were sketchy as hell,” wrote a Democratic activist and former Capitol Hill staffer, Dana Houle, in a since-deleted tweet on Friday. “Would it matter if her kids were scooped up by ultra-religious Americans, or ... when there was family in Haiti?” Another left-wing activist, John Lee Brougher of the NextGen America PAC, added fuel to the fire. “As an adoptee, I need to know more about the circumstances of how Amy Coney Barrett came to adopt her children, and the treatment of them since,” Brougher wrote, according to Breitbart News. “Transracial adoption is fraught with trauma and potential for harm.” Brougher’s tweet has also been removed. These racist cowards didn't even have the guts to stand behind their woke racism. Others on the extreme Left, however, DID stand by their racist attacks- and are paid by major universities to do so. Ibram X. Kendi, an American author who became the new director of the Center for Antiracist Research at Boston University in July, railed against Barrett on Twitter for adopting two Black children from Haiti, equating her and her husband to “White colonizers.” “Some White colonizers ‘adopted’ Black children. They ‘civilized’ these ‘savage’ children in the ‘superior’ ways of White people, while using them as props in their lifelong pictures of denial, while cutting the biological parents of these children out of the picture of humanity,” Kendi wrote Saturday. Image I thought we were beyond this as a country, but maybe not. The Left that commands Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have been murdering people, burning cities, and engaging in personal targeting (they call it "cancelling") for years. This is good enough reason not to vote for any Democrat, on any level, this year. They won't condemn the disgusting treason and violence in their own ranks- including the racist attacks on Judge Barrett's family! Image How could you see a picture of the Barrett family and hate those children? Imagine how full of hate- extremist, ideological hate- you would have to be. I am not full of hate, and I bet you aren't either. I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left! If we want to stop Leftist racism, we must stand together NOW! The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations. If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now! I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left! Can you help me? This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: TODAY: I'm telling Congress to take on Big Tech
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/83d0b982bb31/announcing-my-new-book-break-em-up-5073300?e=e870238275)
---
| |
---
| | | | **Hi Friend,**

Today, after conducting a rigorous year-long investigation into the gatekeeping power of Amazon, Apple, Facebook, and Google, the House Antitrust Subcommittee is holding a hearing to discuss the policy solutions needed to break the growing and dangerous power of big tech.

I’m excited to say I’ll be testifying this afternoon - and I hope you’ll tune in.

---
| [WATCH HERE at 1PM ET](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=87d221d355&e=e870238275 "WATCH HERE at 1PM ET")
---
| America has a monopoly problem. As the [American Economic Liberties Project’s recent "Ledger of Harms" shows](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=9742d3209c&e=e870238275), monopoly power lowers wages, reduces innovation and entrepreneurship, elevates income and regional inequality, undermines the free press, and perpetuates toxic systems of racial and class dominance. Strong antitrust law, as well as other governance and regulatory tools, is a critical way that Americans can protect ourselves from concentrated corporate power.

I’ll be advocating for big changes – the policies we need to break the power of trillion dollar titans and recover our freedom. To get a sneak peek, take a look at some essential reading on big tech!

**Essential Big Tech Reading**
* **“**[**Addressing Facebook and Google’s Harms Through a Regulated Competition Approach**](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=d3af345485&e=e870238275)**,” **explains the policy choices that allowed Facebook and Google to develop a business model toxic to democracy and civil rights, and maps how “regulated competition” could rein in these giants.
* **“**[**Understanding Amazon: Making the 21st-Century Gatekeeper Safe for Democracy**](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=853ce7ec7b&e=e870238275)**,” **demystifies what Amazon's strategy is, the range of abuses it engages in, and the steps policymakers should take to eliminate its extraordinary and unprecedented gatekeeping power over American commerce.
* “[**Close to Home: How the Power of Facebook and Google Affects Local Communities**](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=617f94dd4a&e=e870238275)**,” **analyzes the ways Facebook and Google harm local businesses and destroy local journalism, exposes the political strategies they use to extract subsidies from local communities, and details solutions – at both the federal and local level – to readjust the legal underpinning of this dangerous business model.
* "[**Amazon's Monopoly Tollbooth**](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=b934495d1b&e=e870238275)," reveals how Amazon is entrenching its monopoly grip on e-commerce, extracting more and more from small businesses, and expanding its dominance into logistics and advertising.

_Warmly,
Zephyr_

P.S. If you haven't already, **order my new book** **_Break 'Em Up: Recovering Our Freedom from Big Ag, Big Tech and Big Money _[here](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=b487e991ea&e=e870238275)** to learn how we break the power of corporate monopolies and reclaim our democracy before it’s too late.
---

Let’s do something SO HUGE and SO INCREDIBLE that they won’t be able to ignore how strong our movement is. I want today to be the LARGEST FUNDRAISING DAY IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS! I’ve reactivated your 800%-MATCH for ONE HOUR. I want to know who stood with me when it mattered most, so I’ve asked my team to send me a list of EVERY AMERICAN PATRIOT who donates to this email. Please make a special contribution of ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY for an 800%-MATCH and to have your name on the list I see. >> DONOR FILE SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com ACCOUNT NUMBER: 6124335 - 2020 800%-MATCH: ACTIVATED DEADLINE: 1 HOUR CONTRIBUTE $5 = $45 CONTRIBUTE $20 = $180 CONTRIBUTE $15 = $135 CONTRIBUTE $10 = $90 CONTRIBUTE $5 = $45 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT While I made it clear that I would Make America Great Again, Joe Biden, on the other hand, will: - DESTROY our Nation’s economy - Pack our courts with socialist activists - RUIN our critical progress to eradicate the China Virus - And, he would allow ANTIFA THUGS to destroy our communities.I need you right now. You stood by my side throughout the 2016 Election, and I need to know you’ll be by my side once again in November. Please make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT and it will be 800%-MATCHED. body:

Peter,
_**THANK YOU #TeamRonchetti**_
_**To all of you who donated before our end of quarter deadline or helped our campaign in any way during this last quarter, Thank you!**_**** This has been our biggest quarter yet by every metric, and Krysty and I could not be more thankful for your support. We truly could not keep moving this campaign forward without you. It has been humbling to see our supporters all across the state.

We are ecstatic that, with your help, we were able to meet our end of quarter goals, but there is still a month left until Election Day, and we have A LOT of work to do.

name: Team Carney
subject: Can you chip in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1nu7D41HXllswACQySkCQ==/AZwhlRcFtFX5bFMHhmZqPA==?midqs=UoehXp0j4_8c_0DoFhnA_g==)

**FROM THE TEAM**

President Trump's supporters are backing our opponent this November, and we need your help.

If you support prioritizing the safety and health of Delawareans, new investments in public infrastructure and public education, and a real plan to confront climate change -- help us push back against the President's radical agenda.

We have an important fundraising deadline on Saturday. Can you chip in to support Governor Carney's campaign?

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1nu7D41HXllswACQySkCQ==/AZwhlRcFtFX5bFMHhmZqPA==)

**GOVERNOR CARNEY 'S RECORD**

**BUDGET:** Governor Carney's new $125 million budget reserve is getting us through this crisis without spending cuts or higher taxes.

**JOBS:** Governor Carney worked with legislators to pass the largest public infrastructure program in Delaware history - funding new investments in clean water, high-speed broadband, roads and bridges, and new schools.

**EDUCATION:** Governor Carney's $75 million Opportunity Funding program targeted new resources for low-income students and English learners in Delaware public schools. The program also funds new mental health and reading resources.

**HEALTH CARE:** Governor Carney has taken a science-based approach to COVID-19 and focused on protecting lives. Governor Carney also worked with the General Assembly to codify Obamacare in Delaware law, including protections for Delawareans with pre-existing conditions.

Thanks for your continued support,

Team Carney

**REMINDER: **The deadline to register to vote in the General Election is October 10. Visit ivote.de.gov to check your registration status and to register to vote by mail.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1nu7D41HXllswACQySkCQ==/DMbySorS_hapSvmVaLCSgg==?midqs=UoehXp0j4_8c_0DoFhnA_g==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/G1nu7D41HXllswACQySkCQ==/dhMNPKlBB1u5GcqYVF4eLA==)

subject: Radical far-left gun control thugs just endorsed my opponent
body:

Patriot,

We need _more_ elected officials in Washington like me... leaders who support the Second Amendment, stand with police, and fight to defend American families.

We _don’t_ need radical anti-police, pro-riot gun-grabbers like Lois Frankel.

If you agree, then I need your immediate support.

[**Will you pitch in an emergency $10 right away to help me continue to surge... and crush Lois in November?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395535-931544-5220230-90fc1ecdb2-5b472c22b9)

[**Please make your most generous donation of $10, $25, or even $50 right away and help me win.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395535-931544-5220230-90fc1ecdb2-5b472c22b9)

It’s no shock Lois got this radical endorsement.
* Lois has **fought our right to bear arms** every chance she gets... pushing the far-left’s insane gun confiscation plots.
* Lois has **undermined police and put politics over public safety** by standing with rioters.
* Lois **literally said “thank you” to Antifa rioters** who lit cars on fire, looted family-run businesses, and terrorized our community.

She must be defeated. [**Will you help me make that happen by chipping in an emergency $10 right away?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395535-931544-5220230-90fc1ecdb2-5b472c22b9)

[**Please pitch in just $10—or even $25 or $50—right away to stand up for our country and help me win in November.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395535-931544-5220230-90fc1ecdb2-5b472c22b9)

Thanks for your help.

Laura Loomer

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Amy Coney Barrett Redefines Feminism: 'A New Role Model for Women Instead of the One Size Fits All'
body:
Supreme Court nominee Judge Amy Coney Barrett, who had sit-downs with senators Tuesday, has impressed congressional Republicans by redefining feminism | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=956c361562&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Amy Coney Barrett Redefines Feminism: 'A New Role Model for Women Instead of the One Size Fits All'**

“Supreme Court nominee Judge Amy Coney Barrett, who had her first sit-downs with senators Tuesday, has impressed congressional Republicans by redefining feminism,” Alex Swoyer and Gabriella Muñoz write in _The Washington Times_.

“A working mother of seven school-age children who rose to the top of the legal ladder, Judge Barrett balanced life as a classroom mother while handing down rulings as a federal circuit court judge . . . A devout Catholic, Judge Barrett also provides Christian conservative women one of their own as a new feminist leader for young women.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6494c150c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “More than 80 percent of the world’s population lives in countries with high or severe restrictions on religious freedom,” U.S. Ambassador to the Vatican Callista Gingrich writes. “As America has shown time and time again, we will not sit back as individuals are killed, jailed, harassed, or tortured for their faith.” Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c151118460&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxnews.com/opinion/callista-gingrich-trump-religious-freedom").
---
|
---
| “What’s happening in America today reminds me of life under Communism,” Rod Dreher writes. “Who needs the gulag when you can compel obedience by threatening someone’s job or destroy her reputation on social media? Why bother with the secret police when the masses already hand over detailed personal information to Google” and other massive technology corporations? Read more in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eddb92231e&e=3ee4985eea "https://nypost.com/2020/09/28/refugees-from-tyranny-agree-authoritarian-threat-in-america-now-is-from-the-left/").
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump signed an executive order and declared a national emergency Wednesday to expand the domestic mining industry. The executive order is also meant to support mining jobs, alleviate unnecessary permitting delays and reduce the nation’s dependence on China for critical minerals,” Adelle Whitefoot reports in the [_Duluth News Tribune_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87d94db543&e=3ee4985eea).

**READ** : [Executive Order on Addressing the Threat to the Domestic Supply Chain](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=75bb7e4688&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf7227ffe4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=91f5767000&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ac5acd2443)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Battleground State Polling
subject: Who Will Win Florida in 2020?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019_6fuiHfQYUCOYnk0wchUDR5aP9BhFSUL6o_v3qEXA6F41-VoJySUmAWTLn1RY9V6BUmyx_DNTiNbBW702S2q0mopl9rFgFXiBDzY3X0AMZojxnk5IMp_P898mYNZvWP7_Ao_e1B5JtgS5u_fkZ5FG6lmgcnKB-yRlsEQUf0-qN0c1ulAPvWi7aHwc-9hzAI&c=Fm1srkHlRhjyuk2mY2xEPR9Bt4e4JI2s9h6aenLdR0WUpbdTdBAuoA==&ch=lkYz0n5a9e8tV3x28ghCd1J-eE4HgurfcddYvG5_SMtAARlZgkPraQ==)

| Peter,
In the race for President, Florida is a must-win. The state's 29 Electoral College votes make it one of the biggest prizes, and because it is a "purple" state, it will be one of the biggest battlegrounds of 2020.
Florida has voted Republican in recent elections, but anything can happen in the current political climate. And with Michael Bloomberg's recent pay-to-vote scheme, our state is even more vulnerable to flip from red to blue. While mainstream media outlets often frame their polls to make President Trump look bad, we are polling real Americans, the Silent Majority, in order to get an accurate look at who might win this crucial battleground state.
Your response is valuable to our poll, so we ask that you [take just one minute](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019_6fuiHfQYUCOYnk0wchUDR5aP9BhFSUL6o_v3qEXA6F41-VoJySUmAWTLn1RY9V6BUmyx_DNTiNbBW702S2q0mopl9rFgFXiBDzY3X0AMZojxnk5IMp_P898mYNZvWP7_Ao_e1B5JtgS5u_fkZ5FG6lmgcnKB-yRlsEQUf0-qN0c1ulAPvWi7aHwc-9hzAI&c=Fm1srkHlRhjyuk2mY2xEPR9Bt4e4JI2s9h6aenLdR0WUpbdTdBAuoA==&ch=lkYz0n5a9e8tV3x28ghCd1J-eE4HgurfcddYvG5_SMtAARlZgkPraQ==) to answer our poll today:

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Fair Fight Action's October Volunteer Opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c6/2230824478/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend- Georgians have begun casting their votes for the general election. With early voting and Election Day around the corner, it's crucial that we reach out to as many voters as possible about making their plans to vote, however they choose to do so. We also need YOU to sign up as a poll observer with Fair Fight Action. Poll observers are crucial to helping ensure that Georgia voters can cast their ballots safely and have them count. Poll observers will be outside early vote and Election Day polling places to observe people going in and out of the voting location and to safely ask voters to share their experience. They may also safely conduct "line warming" in places where there are people waiting in line for their chance to vote. Poll observers will receive training and protective equipment for their work. **[Sign up as an outside poll observer HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c7/2230824478/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://bit.ly/FFApollObserver").** Join us for our October volunteer events and help us text and call hundreds of thousands of voters across Georgia about making their plan to vote! With your help, we can provide voters with the necessary resources to cast their vote, from voting by mail to early voting all the way to Election Day. Poll Observer Recruitment Weekend of Action October 3 and 4 Text Bank [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c4/2230824478/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/327995/") Phone Bank _[SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c5/2230824478/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/327992/")_ Early Voting Weekend of Action October 10 and 11 Text and Phone Bank _[SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c2/2230824478/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/334748/")_ Latinx GOTV Text Bank October 10 and 11 Spanish-speaking volunteers required [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c3/2230824478/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/334786/") AAPI GOTV Phone Bank **In partnership with Asian American Advocacy Fund and They See Blue** Training: Oct 13 Phonebank: October 13-18 [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c0/2230824478/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/336214/") GOTV Weekend of Action October 24 and 25 Text and Phone Bank [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c1/2230824478/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/334805/") GOTV Weekend of Action October 31 - November 3 Text and Phone Bank [SIGN UP HERE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4be/34a064cc/1a36758a/702d0c1/2230824478/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mobilize.us/fairfightaction/event/334805/") Directly contacting voters is a crucial way to ensure they have the information needed for this election. As we draw closer to the election, with Early Voting just around the corner, it's crucial that voters have a plan to cast their ballots and that they have the information they need to do so. Sign up today! To make calls, you will need a computer or tablet and a cell phone; to send texts you need only a computer or tablet. Join from anywhere and help us get the word out! Last but certainly not least, MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE! Election Day is around the corner. If you haven't mailed out your absentee ballot, consider dropping it off at a county dropbox, available in most counties. You can find a drop box near you by calling 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). If you plan to vote during the early vote period, you can find convenient early vote locations in your county at vote.org. If you have any questions about voting, call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). Thank you for all you do, Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

clean_body: | "" | | Friend- Georgians have begun casting their votes for the general election. With early voting and Election Day around the corner, it's crucial that we reach out to as many voters as possible about making their plans to vote, however they choose to do so. We also need YOU to sign up as a poll observer with Fair Fight Action. Poll observers are crucial to helping ensure that Georgia voters can cast their ballots safely and have them count. Poll observers will be outside early vote and Election Day polling places to observe people going in and out of the voting location and to safely ask voters to share their experience. They may also safely conduct "line warming" in places where there are people waiting in line for their chance to vote. Poll observers will receive training and protective equipment for their work. "". Join us for our October volunteer events and help us text and call hundreds of thousands of voters across Georgia about making their plan to vote! With your help, we can provide voters with the necessary resources to cast their vote, from voting by mail to early voting all the way to Election Day. Poll Observer Recruitment Weekend of Action October 3 and 4 Text Bank "" Phone Bank "" Early Voting Weekend of Action October 10 and 11 Text and Phone Bank "" Latinx GOTV Text Bank October 10 and 11 Spanish-speaking volunteers required "" AAPI GOTV Phone Bank In partnership with Asian American Advocacy Fund and They See Blue Training: Oct 13 Phonebank: October 13-18 "" GOTV Weekend of Action October 24 and 25 Text and Phone Bank "" GOTV Weekend of Action October 31 - November 3 Text and Phone Bank "" Directly contacting voters is a crucial way to ensure they have the information needed for this election. As we draw closer to the election, with Early Voting just around the corner, it's crucial that voters have a plan to cast their ballots and that they have the information they need to do so. Sign up today! To make calls, you will need a computer or tablet and a cell phone; to send texts you need only a computer or tablet. Join from anywhere and help us get the word out! Last but certainly not least, MAKE A PLAN TO VOTE! Election Day is around the corner. If you haven't mailed out your absentee ballot, consider dropping it off at a county dropbox, available in most counties. You can find a drop box near you by calling 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). If you plan to vote during the early vote period, you can find convenient early vote locations in your county at vote.org. If you have any questions about voting, call 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683). Thank you for all you do, Team Fair Fight Action | ---|---|--- | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2020 Fair Fight Action, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Hunt Raises $3 Million in Q3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Wesley Hunt Announces $3 Million Raised in Third Quarter**

Houston, TX - Today, Hunt for Congress announced that Wesley Hunt, Houston native and combat veteran running in Texas' 7th Congressional District, raised almost $3 million in the third quarter. Hunt's fundraising success as a first-time challenger illustrates the enthusiasm and momentum Hunt has in the 7th District, and outlines a highly competitive race.

_"I am incredibly encouraged and humbled by the outstanding support our campaign has received in the 7th District. Houstonians believe in our campaign. They can see clearly our vision for a better future and they are taking action to make that vision a reality,"_ said **Hunt**. _"Seventh District voters are fed up with the empty promises and partisanship from the incumbent; they are ready for new representation in Congress. To everyone who has helped us reach this milestone, thank you for believing in our campaign and for joining us on this important mission to restore leadership, accountability, and independence to the 7th District._ _We will continue to work every day to earn your trust and support."_

Wesley Hunt is a Houston native and a battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.

_Hunt raised $2.5 million to Hunt for Congress with an additional $500,000 to the Hunt Victory Fund._

###
****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=63c065be522f49c1b5014ebc1a337f7c&_e=7IZDqy5SMMeulHfUD_A3IH-H2PcGPRkf0EDIm7qNaQJzqd7j_m99-qCmp7iObYUebj_0O8f-u8zVi6tH1rcjY1ODb0e2iqKqk2fpgsTewCVq3NXPZmIJ5l8q1XKT_xYdavv3C-BaQbsVk9yYmVyJHHqkNxnDLtPIFTDxOdnITE1Vt0-ogs5LzTMcpqULFx1vk3z0FoyyugyoNK5SKG5BS63db2n_03cPg0xG-qtbuzkl9k2A3FUsn8L5BhLKHjb9x536B7eVsCKpYbzd-ldpCV9gyBloK__B1d0cC-5LcmU%3D)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20McCarver=20=2D=20Team=20Dani?=
subject: Join Team Dani this weekend and help us win the election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cf6880e2d94b/join-team-dani-in-ottawa-this-saturday-3911818?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| Hi there! Dave from Team Dani here.

**I wanted to make sure you saw this email I sent you yesterday regarding how important this upcoming weekend is for our campaign.** We'd love to have you join us in Ottawa this Saturday to help get our message out, but if you can't make it then [you can sign up here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c5eb287873&e=140a9b81e7) to help us reach voters by phonebanking from the comfort of your own home!

We _need_ your help this weekend. Check out the email below and sign up to help us win!
---
| |
#
With only 34 days to go before Election Day, we need your help to get our message out to the voters! **This Saturday, we'll be joining the LaSalle County Democratic Party for a day of action in Ottawa** to help get out the vote for Democrats up and down the ballot.

We'll be there along with several other Democratic candidates in key races. You won't want to miss this chance to help turn LaSalle County blue! The event will kick off at 11 am at Jordan Block, right across the street from JJ's Pub on East Main in Ottawa. The event will be outdoors, and masks are required. Learn more [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=07163c730a&e=140a9b81e7)!

Come out to meet Democratic candidates, pick up yard signs, and help us distribute literature via no-contact lit drops! **Volunteers will be entered to win prizes and snacks will be provided!**

Can't make it to Ottawa this Saturday? That's okay! You can also help us get the word out by signing up to drop lit in your neighborhood or to make calls from the comfort of your own home. [Click here to sign up!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=fc67e7eb8f&e=140a9b81e7)

We hope to see you on Saturday!

name: Corky Messner
subject: The sprint to November 3rd
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/89d5babf0a3ce684/1346b0f8354ee727c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Election Day is just over a month away... and it’s all hands on deck to ensure we’re ready for the final sprint.

My opponent — career politician Jeanne Shaheen — has raised more than $12 MILLION to attack me and keep this seat in Democrat hands.

There’s a reason liberal mega-donors are giving her millions: They know she’s vulnerable.

We don’t need to outraise Jeanne Shaheen to win. _But we must have the resources it takes to keep our ads running and fund our Get Out The Vote program._ _**We’re launching a 12-hour “Money Bomb” fundraising campaign**_ to continue firing on all cylinders, so we maintain our momentum through October and DEFEAT Jeanne Shaneen on November 3rd! **[Tap or click here to rush a secure contribution. Our goal is 100% participation to raise $10,000 by 11:59 p.m. tonight.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/89d5babf0a3ce684/620272c8d613be47c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [🚨 Make a secure “Money Bomb” Contribution!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/89d5babf0a3ce684/9e3d8d84b1ea9798c3d6b838967d376c/33153) This Sunday, we’ll have just 30 days to go until Election Day. That’s less than five full weeks to reach undecided voters and leave it all on the field to FLIP this seat.

**Six more years of DC Jeanne Shaheen could also mean Majority Leader Chuck Schumer. It could mean packing the Supreme Court, another impeachment of President Trump, higher taxes, and the $93 trillion Green New Deal**. We both know this would be disastrous for our state and country, Peter! [**Join fellow Republicans President Trump, Governor Sununu, Rand Paul and Ted Cruz in supporting my campaign by rushing a secure contribution**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/89d5babf0a3ce684/ae1347e51ea11b9ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Don’t let the Democrats BURY us in their liberal millions! name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Your chance, Friend
body:

name: Kat for Congress
subject: Catch up with Kat!
body:
You don't want to miss this.

| |

| Trail Update
---
| Friends, Last week, I got to see President Trump twice. Once in the White House and another time in Florida.
It was an honor to be a part of the introductory lineup for President Trump when he came to Jacksonville, and I had the pleasure of introducing Governor Ron DeSantis. [You can view my full remarks here.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001abvt_OdTJ2pjsYNTzVwHIJ-b_uVM2UmbQ50GhcW5qL3oAKp3Pvdth8jdJZdymNw_jNthaGHC40SxpMUEAmXFkM12wiAYyOCFYPXAeCHST08Ww0LdwYQeEUScAQy0HBCwSXsEFR98lcP_-4ZVX2vkXMJTAsL8RfbxXTVTItyq8iz2sl2VUOdd_Nn8d3giferH&c=1eGmxGQlpk-_YdPuTOh2j4zrq-dIeBdoim_BLp-Oq7mKxCBe1nYYXA==&ch=CqIOa119HiTRuDFIwCJ0ZHY8ST60QKmOVIq7rVMvUAf6MBZzb7R_Dg==)
---
| |
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001abvt_OdTJ2pjsYNTzVwHIJ-b_uVM2UmbQ50GhcW5qL3oAKp3Pvdth8jdJZdymNw_jNthaGHC40SxpMUEAmXFkM12wiAYyOCFYPXAeCHST08Ww0LdwYQeEUScAQy0HBCwSXsEFR98lcP_-4ZVX2vkXMJTAsL8RfbxXTVTItyq8iz2sl2VUOdd_Nn8d3giferH&c=1eGmxGQlpk-_YdPuTOh2j4zrq-dIeBdoim_BLp-Oq7mKxCBe1nYYXA==&ch=CqIOa119HiTRuDFIwCJ0ZHY8ST60QKmOVIq7rVMvUAf6MBZzb7R_Dg==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001abvt_OdTJ2pjsYNTzVwHIJ-b_uVM2UmbQ50GhcW5qL3oAKp3Pvdth8jdJZdymNw_N62UyvEUDvG9oPSNTSAP9i45lkAQ0zs1tegL4CdvRT3vIqRyQw8RGctRdluS8IGY3ZYqzLTkjnhUFr9t50JGaFFPrBWJ27nxKAvUIPdiASyXlNF8Be0MGPEBKFESCR4g_MoYp8kRNxZvc81WjJY4LFxd5HsZURed&c=1eGmxGQlpk-_YdPuTOh2j4zrq-dIeBdoim_BLp-Oq7mKxCBe1nYYXA==&ch=CqIOa119HiTRuDFIwCJ0ZHY8ST60QKmOVIq7rVMvUAf6MBZzb7R_Dg==)
---
| While in the Oval Office, I had the opportunity to talk to the President about our growing economy, the Supreme Court, and how I will work with him to be a champion of his America First agenda.
Last week, I also had to opportunity to get around the district. I was able to meet with my good friends at God's Country Outfitters, and I am thankful that they were able to host me and register new voters! I enjoy seeing new people becoming involved in our democratic process.
---
| On Saturday, with 38 days to go, I was able to join my team in knocking on doors. I hope to see many of you out on the trail before November. If you are interested in joining my team and helping us secure victory, please email [conrad@katforcongress.com](mailto:conrad@katforcongress.com).
God Bless,
Kat
---
| Building Team Kat
---
| I am proud to have Judson Sapp's endorsement. He released a statement saying:
"The 2020 elections are a crucial moment for our Republic. The choices could not be more clear: Republicans love America and support freedom while Democrats ridicule our nation, our values, and oppose basic god-given rights. President Trump needs allies, not more Democrat obstruction. To preserve the America we know and love, in this election, we must vote for our Republican nominee for Congress, Kat Cammack."
---
| |

| I am also honored to have the endorsement from Sheriff Michelle Cook. She released a statement saying:
"As a law enforcement official, I have seen firsthand the work that she does for the first responder community. She has spent the last decade fighting for first responders in DC and founded the Grit Foundation, a local organization dedicated to meeting the needs of first responder agencies. Kat is a faithful advocate for our first responder communities and will be an effective leader on Capitol Hill."
---
| | |

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | Trail Update | Friends, Last week, I got to see President Trump twice. Once in the White House and another time in Florida. It was an honor to be a part of the introductory lineup for President Trump when he came to Jacksonville, and I had the pleasure of introducing Governor Ron DeSantis. == | | == | == | While in the Oval Office, I had the opportunity to talk to the President about our growing economy, the Supreme Court, and how I will work with him to be a champion of his America First agenda. Last week, I also had to opportunity to get around the district. I was able to meet with my good friends at God's Country Outfitters, and I am thankful that they were able to host me and register new voters! I enjoy seeing new people becoming involved in our democratic process. | On Saturday, with 38 days to go, I was able to join my team in knocking on doors. I hope to see many of you out on the trail before November. If you are interested in joining my team and helping us secure victory, please email mailto:conrad@katforcongress.com. God Bless, Kat | Building Team Kat | I am proud to have Judson Sapp's endorsement. He released a statement saying: "The 2020 elections are a crucial moment for our Republic. The choices could not be more clear: Republicans love America and support freedom while Democrats ridicule our nation, our values, and oppose basic god-given rights. President Trump needs allies, not more Democrat obstruction. To preserve the America we know and love, in this election, we must vote for our Republican nominee for Congress, Kat Cammack." | | == | | | | | == | I am also honored to have the endorsement from Sheriff Michelle Cook. She released a statement saying: "As a law enforcement official, I have seen firsthand the work that she does for the first responder community. She has spent the last decade fighting for first responders in DC and founded the Grit Foundation, a local organization dedicated to meeting the needs of first responder agencies. Kat is a faithful advocate for our first responder communities and will be an effective leader on Capitol Hill." | | | | I am honored to have the endorsement from Dr. James St. George. He released a statement saying: "We need someone strong in DC with the Radical Left working hard to undermine traditional American values in favor of socialism. As a physician, I've seen this push for socialism through standardized healthcare regulations that bankrupt patients and caregivers alike. Please join me in voting for Kat Cammack in the General on November 3rd!" | | == | On Social Media | == | | My team and I wished our friends and supporters a restful Yom Kippur. I hope their fast was easy and peaceful. G'mar Chatima Tova! | How You Can Help | Join Team Kat As we head to the General Election in November, we need help spreading our winning message. I would love to have you join our team! If you would like to help our team in any way, please click == to sign up today! | | == | == | | | | == | | My team and I are excited to distribute more yard signs! We also will have a number of 4' x 4' and 4' x 8' signs available upon request. If you would like a sign for your yard, please click == to reserve your sign today. A member of my team will then deliver the sign to your home. Thank you for your support! | | | | | We are working hard to execute on a winning strategy, and every dollar raised helps us toward victory in November! If you are able, please consider clicking == to make a contribution to the campaign. As always, thank you for your incredible trust and support! | == | Send us an mailto:info@katforcongress.com Like us on == Follow us on == Follow us on == Visit our == Sincerely, | | Kat Cammack Candidate for Congress | | | | | == | | www.KatforCongress.com | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

From the desk of the Campaign Manager:
Hey Peter,
Hope you’re doing well! I just wanted to give you an update on the campaign and how excited we are about our position in the race. With only 5 days until absentee ballots go out, and 33 days until election day, we are in the home stretch now!

I also wanted to personally thank you for being a part of this campaign. Yesterday, we had our biggest deadline of the campaign - the end of the third finance quarter. With your help, support, and generous donations, we surpassed our goal! We are going to win this race because of the support you’ve given us. So from everyone at Team Mark, thank you for your continuing support.
_**Communications Update**_

In case you missed it, Mark has a new ad on TV!

Mark frames the U.S. Senate race and the big choices the voters of New Mexico face - do they support Mark’s vision for more job opportunity, better education, and safer streets or Ben Ray Lujan’s vision that includes his support for cutting 100,000 jobs, slashing public education funding, and releasing violent criminals from prison early.
---

clean_body: | | | | From the desk of the Campaign Manager: Hey Peter, Hope you’re doing well! I just wanted to give you an update on the campaign and how excited we are about our position in the race. With only 5 days until absentee ballots go out, and 33 days until election day, we are in the home stretch now! I also wanted to personally thank you for being a part of this campaign. Yesterday, we had our biggest deadline of the campaign - the end of the third finance quarter. With your help, support, and generous donations, we surpassed our goal! We are going to win this race because of the support you’ve given us. So from everyone at Team Mark, thank you for your continuing support. Communications Update In case you missed it, Mark has a new ad on TV! Mark frames the U.S. Senate race and the big choices the voters of New Mexico face - do they support Mark’s vision for more job opportunity, better education, and safer streets or Ben Ray Lujan’s vision that includes his support for cutting 100,000 jobs, slashing public education funding, and releasing violent criminals from prison early. | Grassroots Update Our campaign has already begun contacting voters to persuade them to support Mark on election day! We’ve contacted over 70,000 voters statewide, but we need to reach more! If you want to phone from home or safely knock doors, sign up at the link below. One of our County Field Directors will reach out to you! | Thank you all so much for being a part of our campaign team. This is a conservative movement that will take effort from all of us across this beautiful state to turn this seat red. We cannot express how important your support is and what it means to all of us on Team Mark. God bless, Jeff Glassburner Campaign Manager Mark Ronchetti for New Mexico | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO =

name: Tom Cotton
subject: WATCH: my first ad for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
In the Army, I witnessed the true meaning of sacrifice and service. Our country owes a debt to our military servicemen and veterans that we can never repay. But Washington can do so much more to help. I just released my first ad for my Arkansas re-election campaign focused on support for our veterans. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1OTI4MDgS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDA5MDM4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

In the Army, I witnessed the true meaning of sacrifice and service.

Our country owes a debt to our military servicemen and veterans that we can never repay. But Washington can do so much more to help.

I just released my first ad for my Arkansas re-election campaign focused on support for our veterans.
Watch the Ad by Clicking Here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1OTI4MDgS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDA5MDM4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1OTI4MDgS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDA5MDM4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Watch the Ad by Clicking Here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1OTI4MDgS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDA5MDM4NgS2&mt=1&rt=0 I am fighting for a stronger military and better healthcare for our heroes.

No soldier should ever go into battle underprepared or underequipped. And no veteran should ever be denied the benefits they have earned.

I will make sure our veterans receive the high quality healthcare and benefits they deserve.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Outside the box
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I'm so inspired by the ways in which businesses and communities have really embraced the Take It Outside initiative. Two weeks ago, we announced $1 million in funding to help do more outdoors. We asked for municipalities, industry associations and other organizations to send us proposals on how they would use grant funding in order to help the businesses in their communities.
We thought we might get a couple dozen proposals, which would have been great. Instead, in just the past two weeks, we have received over 80 proposals with so many great, innovative ideas - from creating a lending library of heat lamps, outdoors tables and lighting, and additional equipment for businesses, to providing WiFi hotspots outside of all our state's libraries in order to allow for expanded outdoor programming.
When I announced this initiative, I said that if there's a lot of demand, then I will put more funding behind it. That's certainly been the case. So we're adding additional funding to this grant program. Today, I was excited to announce the first round of grants, totaling $3 million.
I'm so excited about some of the amazing project that commercial and community groups are taking on, from the Narragansett Chamber of Commerce's proposal to create an outdoor holiday market, to Progreso Latino's plan to help the Central Falls food pantry so more outdoors. You can see the full list of recipients [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NjyVd5csLbnNIPRw8zH-OHrDQkUjrUrV_1AWdbPAOseBMWZKVFQ-CHGZpQLtbpwARLFDFTbup8gkcX8QkV7lAYOYh--KUEq1AR_KEzNIkw1yx0zrE2eH3euDxB64WcuRih3WoKSh03d03Aq9GyfmCO_5sG254oFussuQrTz-9BAEi5mu2XCLqfWvv0T_SjqEvHByEGspYbs1gPTIt4foDe3VBLtC0x3Ac0UezjR5SPTlmaIFaB4YauBcrgEkWZPd&c=Bn7OsuvmAnFXeet1ubY_LjVP43EqVp_nZAoN2ce2cYUKenVpH9-Z_w==&ch=BKP3gS-p0Ue3tbHFWd9tW6CiOLcknLt3F1BTwhOE6GgI7pr_jvmsyw==).
We want to continue the success of this program, so we've set aside the additional $2 million for a second round. If you haven't submitted a proposal and want to get involved, go to [TakeItOutsideRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NjyVd5csLbnNIPRw8zH-OHrDQkUjrUrV_1AWdbPAOseBMWZKVFQ-CA_irVYryQFw3Z4pwl8Jbzr2DB2pDg8tlaB_HYFP_HZy1eg4nteb-jvvXswJGdmNK6u-0ZQamjnsEug1GSOfAq7X3b0INaF4Xg==&c=Bn7OsuvmAnFXeet1ubY_LjVP43EqVp_nZAoN2ce2cYUKenVpH9-Z_w==&ch=BKP3gS-p0Ue3tbHFWd9tW6CiOLcknLt3F1BTwhOE6GgI7pr_jvmsyw==).
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NjyVd5csLbnNIPRw8zH-OHrDQkUjrUrV_1AWdbPAOseBMWZKVFQ-CHGZpQLtbpwAtO_6-ACR5czzYq4FzQOSASTGmbPzMkm0tg4yjDyVYYw62AoUUMBgGjZeo2nPd2ex10JTISEcmLlWtC__jNyJySh13dTK46uBYCDBBDy6gmyQq9UQeESrqqyw6jCOLCKzpek_eqelpN9e4ha2GRv4C_2sZN8spwl0YpYtFMdLtCThhZOHxv89KkldFC-H0kXt3s8hvn_jUIytcmUR4cujuXH0kKsKSbowzyCeN-pbAX-F2eWsqMe3aowgGfSNXDa-Y4-V-iZ3ta0=&c=Bn7OsuvmAnFXeet1ubY_LjVP43EqVp_nZAoN2ce2cYUKenVpH9-Z_w==&ch=BKP3gS-p0Ue3tbHFWd9tW6CiOLcknLt3F1BTwhOE6GgI7pr_jvmsyw==).

subject: NEW: President Trump takes action to protect American mining from China
body:
President Trump signed an executive order yesterday to reduce American dependence on China...

https://www.whitehouse.gov/1600daily/
The White House • October 1, 2020

** NEW: President Trump takes action to protect American mining from China
------------------------------------------------------------
President Trump signed an executive order yesterday to reduce American dependence on China for critical minerals. The order also expands the domestic mining industry, supports American mining jobs, and reduces unnecessary permit delays.

These minerals—which include aluminum, lithium, titanium, and many others—are essential inputs for airplanes, computers, cell phones, electricity systems, and advanced electronic products. They are crucial both for our economy and our national security.

For several decades, our country’s mining industry has suffered because of political inaction, a broken permitting process, and predatory foreign competition from China. As a result, the United States is heavily reliant on foreign imports for critical minerals despite the presence of significant sources for many of them across our country.

“We will put our miners back to work,” President Trump said.

Yesterday’s action builds on President Trump’s commitment to restore and strengthen our economy as we safely reopen from the global Coronavirus pandemic.

The Trump Administration has already worked to reform outdated bureaucracy, which too often held up vital American infrastructure projects. This year, amid the Coronavirus outbreak from China, President Trump leveraged the Defense Production Act dozens of times to support production of critical medical equipment here in America.

President Trump also placed a pause on new immigrant visas through the end of this year, ensuring that we continue to put American workers first during this recovery.

📖 President Trump is protecting our mining industry! (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-protecting-domestic-mining-industry-critical-minerals-supply-chains/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

📖 MORE: Read President Trump’s executive order. (https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/executive-order-addressing-threat-domestic-supply-chain-reliance-critical-minerals-foreign-adversaries/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

** White House announces dates for Fall Garden Tours!
------------------------------------------------------------
President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump are opening the White House gardens and grounds to the public on October 17 and 18, from 10 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET.

“The grounds will open on Oct 17 & 18th for the public to view the beautiful colors of the season & experience the beauty of the gardens, including the newly renovated Rose Garden,” the First Lady shared on Twitter. (https://twitter.com/FLOTUS/status/1311340166318039043?s=20)

Earlier this year, the First Lady unveiled her restoration of the White House Rose Garden. In addition to the Rose Garden, visitors will be able to visit the South Lawn, the First Ladies Garden, and the White House Kitchen Garden.

Tickets are free and will be distributed by the National Park Service on each tour day.

🌼 Learn more about the Fall 2020 Garden Tours! (https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/white-house-announces-2020-fall-garden-tours/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

📖 READ: A look back at the history of the White House Gardens (https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/may-flowers-bloom-closer-look-white-house-gardens-past-present/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Marine One lifts off from the South Lawn of the White House | October 1, 2020

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Why Indiana’s now at Stage 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We wanted to update you on how Indiana’s doing. Indiana’s guiding principles are looking good | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Hoosiers,

Back in May, Governor Holcomb detailed Indiana’s **four guiding principles** – the benchmarks and the data he’s following through the Back on Track plan.

And now that we’re in Stage 5, we wanted to update you on how Indiana’s doing. Indiana’s guiding principles are looking good – and that’s a credit to your hard work.

Here’s where the data stands:

_**Hospitalizations – Fewer Hoosiers Admitted**_
As you can see, on Sept. 25, 64 Hoosiers were admitted to the hospital for COVID-19 – down from 94 Hoosiers admitted just a month ago.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=72a105c45ffd429f9c5d135441cc1e0f&_e=2xcs2cpSy2poWIWB9MyG-DB97OD4m1sfdrY8kJVMdR0xNsvU03pxqLCiG_xFs-QEAfMWBU0Q93vRVXzqXcOlQab077dxhjMHgZfz8ekbRMAvbYNCD6SqWU4VUpjRmwVEoW8fQgFLnXWaFetiZU8LYYc2ipbp1IhL314p557BUDsnB50RSip0NmhSW5RK13JIzldTEBeAdAK64k1DqQnrpMrLYdweKHmSk79YoYmgJYn0NssDqapid3FqZaxj9AC5wdeDThiWpeK3Ypgol2-AKlA69fp-YdTWvvtUzyy03FkoKgQu_NPnTJvPR0acRl2U8pgw2G-sYgCotVdoqQdBkaAbjy46Wejx--62zUKSRt4maEacNe7yHo5EU2QRHCWhoADzOS2Alc3OJbocjsneji232CKOID3v11vi6CeRV0HQy-y1rolKIiyp4tmonNdDqSfc-dEtnaPtrYDvI9yiGg%3D%3D)
_**Surge Capacity – Remains Strong**_
From the outset of the pandemic, “flattening the curve” has been all about ensuring our healthcare system doesn’t get overrun and that we have the resources to care for those Hoosiers most in need. Well, on Tuesday, 37% of the state’s ICU beds and 80% of the state’s ventilators were available – and that’s holding steady.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=72a105c45ffd429f9c5d135441cc1e0f&_e=2xcs2cpSy2poWIWB9MyG-DB97OD4m1sfdrY8kJVMdR0xNsvU03pxqLCiG_xFs-QEAfMWBU0Q93vRVXzqXcOlQab077dxhjMHgZfz8ekbRMAvbYNCD6SqWU4VUpjRmwVEoW8fQgFLnXWaFetiZU8LYYc2ipbp1IhL314p557BUDsnB50RSip0NmhSW5RK13JIzldTEBeAdAK64k1DqQnrpMrLYdweKHmSk79YoYmgJYn0NssDqapid3FqZaxj9AC5y9u5fd7hhbOu2y960HjayC4SYx1HjMpcwi5-MwKC8okXXIPZLkdvQ7K0Lokx4PW7tY5etSPKEugjl6wWgfugHQ7Rre6U58OwfJRJkUkeXhkBtPOmr7K2DXVG36lCYA0exOlF1Ytk_sN_8udd05JIiL5fMXf_sgPA5RVzSnsQIdpJQVvD5U2UYD_2Kb2dwU_qYu_mSOMVVszo8z7prHJxfw%3D%3D)
|
---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=72a105c45ffd429f9c5d135441cc1e0f&_e=2xcs2cpSy2poWIWB9MyG-DB97OD4m1sfdrY8kJVMdR0xNsvU03pxqLCiG_xFs-QEAfMWBU0Q93vRVXzqXcOlQab077dxhjMHgZfz8ekbRMAvbYNCD6SqWU4VUpjRmwVEoW8fQgFLnXWaFetiZU8LYYc2ipbp1IhL314p557BUDsnB50RSip0NmhSW5RK13JIzldTEBeAdAK64k1DqQnrpMrLYdweKHmSk79YoYmgJYn0NssDqapid3FqZaxj9AC55_HxA6pcQ4vvy_8IRxbuxHBHfH1YE5ncF-oaGKQJEGmXGjqqMqpk29vcOWGEKwayaaRDSe5pK95muUBIdvAv5ANu3SzFXi4IJGGELTKGp3caIMlkzf9X9f1PRd4QJzfIW4p8QW64Fqh7sYqa1XdoDrE5cjaXuSEib8-vtDUSP8HEfzuQuJr3bgRHpOfzgceYRoGJiMv6uuSNQ09UXtE2AA%3D%3D)
_**Robust Testing – Available Statewide**_
Governor Holcomb has ensured that any Hoosier who needs a test can get a test. We have 251 active testing sites across Indiana right now. In fact, since May, more than 2 million COVID-19 tests have been administered across Indiana.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=72a105c45ffd429f9c5d135441cc1e0f&_e=2xcs2cpSy2poWIWB9MyG-DB97OD4m1sfdrY8kJVMdR0xNsvU03pxqLCiG_xFs-QEAfMWBU0Q93vRVXzqXcOlQab077dxhjMHgZfz8ekbRMAvbYNCD6SqWU4VUpjRmwVEoW8fQgFLnXWaFetiZU8LYYc2ipbp1IhL314p557BUDsnB50RSip0NmhSW5RK13JIzldTEBeAdAK64k1DqQnrpMrLYdweKHmSk79YoYmgJYn0NssDqapid3FqZaxj9AC58h5hxdeBrdqp0Tbm6EgCAnMsdk1lAup-bD95TjVxFRiykttKoWuogXhmPaRovu843ihLxavRV2htyTZhkjkgaTG8uk5JBp1-C39nug-0M-G-qOP6V3ay-vEim0BKWsv1KKfWcXP2c0630Iji8iq9XNmwYY66In5GQeVgXog-E5A0H__XP_6M0GqS4ug4dftC-M65ou4vTPwRtFxf3xo-4Q%3D%3D)
_**Contact Tracing – Strong & Continuing to Grow**_
Nearly 700 Hoosiers have stepped up to the plate to be state contact tracers – plus nearly an additional 350 at Indiana’s local health departments. Their work is helping track the spread of this virus – and it’s critical to keeping our economy open safely.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=72a105c45ffd429f9c5d135441cc1e0f&_e=2xcs2cpSy2poWIWB9MyG-DB97OD4m1sfdrY8kJVMdR0xNsvU03pxqLCiG_xFs-QEAfMWBU0Q93vRVXzqXcOlQab077dxhjMHgZfz8ekbRMAvbYNCD6SqWU4VUpjRmwVEoW8fQgFLnXWaFetiZU8LYYc2ipbp1IhL314p557BUDsnB50RSip0NmhSW5RK13JIzldTEBeAdAK64k1DqQnrpMrLYdweKHmSk79YoYmgJYn0NssDqapid3FqZaxj9AC5aHlL0N3FgbYIcroD_hNFticy6H3NKuHCVurP6hInqbivlf9WFtVJOdS8DumB9ZF_rpFs3jRfIZRicyyC-WkzIwbhAUnTZjH2pQox5kxXfJzI_rAy220N2Nnoty_P_cKC6yc-7RToux1EIKbhW6-jhc5dxmnvPXuSwskUmoWSadEZEwmYmuY2a_V894WEyBcXBheKHag4yHFlijj3IjItUw%3D%3D)
Hoosiers, good news continues to come to our state and it’s because of Governor Holcomb’s leadership, and because of your dedication. We’re staying healthy, our economy is bouncing back – and together, we’ll reach even greater heights.

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

P.S. We also heard from Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch about two new grants. If you’re helping lead one of**[Indiana’s critical meat processing facilities](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=72a105c45ffd429f9c5d135441cc1e0f&_e=2xcs2cpSy2poWIWB9MyG-AMKBaMb249PKaP_OBWusqc5sR1XgDTnBvmfRc2xWb_imJqstoOxmfOEbXckJ_an0_B5kzPRuYvtYtxwyaCgfEJ1CYolsgXcgksg-sJYruJ5a3l9eWZV7p1JvoqCmsyOontng1RhRkB7SAzEiflSsNApufE4kYIziK9bWByqQ1udX9h8SoADpFGoCnJHC0ItbmZksR1LVLLH7IriSEhrIFtB-Nv37v5jYoYJNpP4EMmk10da4S1seZ8bYYxHF7C1joeNYb01hu1YqEx7VIMGWFJaiMlix8nGsp0Y9xStBHSt-TV5-Iwx2OlDIjbxOpF-dqjsXCA9u6gG2TXq0pRGsdHrES7vUrKcMBQGi30hHtA9xF6hqBKEaddToujZguVE1Md5iuCw0iLwhFWD3gcVgT6dyC5991_9qvafLiOz5WZmeOe-i2FnG-LnoR0FiGFZRzTgPpBpQO7g-yDN7R6nScYb9Qb9UyFdfGUW0cux2FiD)** or if you’re a local government leader looking to **[help Hoosiers with disabilities in your community](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=72a105c45ffd429f9c5d135441cc1e0f&_e=2xcs2cpSy2poWIWB9MyG-KFoO54FpD8AVRBNyMbFfpSq2k-NmB5IhE2KZ99Nxrv1BofwkgmUimngwTqRMYLZ2XAshx3VUSH8JVNxDGTAnkxiuI_VNnqjLR7sAl9rf9Vvx37bLR-2vZ8oGj_ElgDaHOlejZe1IKi1XwHMZRrXZWhFioyEi8HWQwsjn1fMS3cqABnTc2DaYY9-IggRAyOMkzER1NB3sdhG6xvER-gHnUSv0rRfmClfTsSsPIXGyBTxNgHQjUthq66a5bpXxDo79Cts0-LzxumzOXrOPZ62yWA3Pt-nDLf9m_6f8c6DxSoCKX83ucILHck-A3f_3h_gN24zvOq4XWIBRoiJDRo9Fb46CewHyeIceeXN26pnfMjv3r8xqxqXWgDu5RneedwQK9lun9PYAJZOBhBLsdfXGngfP_8JP_skVObKk8Ek2CMA)** , make sure to check out these grants!

name: MJ Hegar
subject: My tattoos don't make me "radical"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
But here's what they WILL tell you about me.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cc2/7f51f7bc/44db4abc/4efbb76a/3290456773/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter --

A pro-Cornyn Super PAC is using a photo of my tattoos to make me seem "radical." I think that's pretty funny. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cc2/7f51f7bc/44db4abc/4efbb769/3290456773/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201001.3nd__2231__&amount=10")
---
Do they think I'm ashamed of them? My tattoos cover my shrapnel wounds from when my helicopter was shot down. They're a mark of my service to our country, and I'm damn proud of them.

What's "radical" to me is that the president called our troops "losers and suckers," and Sen. Cornyn stayed silent.

What's radical is that Sen. Cornyn knowingly voted in favor of the administration stealing funds from our military bases -- and land from hard-working Texans -- to build an ineffective border wall.

What's radical is that Sen. Cornyn and I both took oaths to support and defend our Constitution against threats foreign and domestic, yet John Cornyn refused to condemn the President when he told a far-right, Neo-Fascist organization to "stand by."
[HELP ME OUT](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cc2/7f51f7bc/44db4abc/4efbb769/3290456773/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201001.3nd__2231__&amount=10")
---
Every day it becomes more clear that we urgently need to defeat Sen. Cornyn. My tattoos are a demonstration of what I'm willing to do to serve my country and countrymen, and I will fight like hell for you in the Senate. **Donate now to help me get there.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
